name: Andy Morales
subject: Kevin is a puppet (and MAGA is pulling the strings)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| | Democrat Andy Morales just launched his campaign to defeat Kevin McCarthy.
[Click here to split a donation between his campaign and Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40165?t=6&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
---
Folks – the State of the Union was chaotic.

President Biden laid out his vision to bring America together. Kevin McCarthy rolled his eyes.

He called for a ban on assault weapons, increased trust among police and their communities, and policies that keep our children safe. Republicans shouted their disapproval.

He vowed to protect Medicare and Social Security from right-wing attacks. Marjorie Taylor Greene screamed “Liar!”

And today, Kevin McCarthy defended those who heckled the president. He stood behind those who interrupted, jeered, and put to rest any hopes of partisanship or compromise in the year ahead.

Under Kevin’s leadership, the floor dissolved into chaos. And that’s just a preview of what’s to come; because Kevin isn’t interested in legislating. Instead, he’s focused on investigating Hunter Biden’s laptop, the 2020 Presidential Election (yes! still!), and whatever wild theories Gaetz and Greene come up with next.

Clearly, the MAGA mob is pulling the strings here, not McCarthy.
**[That’s why we cannot let this moment pass us up: I’m asking each of you to split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project so that we can finally defeat Kevin and his band of right-wing extremists and bring some sanity and respect back to the House floor.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40165?t=7&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Andy Morales and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40166?t=8&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40167?t=9&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40168?t=10&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40169?t=11&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40165?t=12&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)
It’s not just about getting rid of those who stall our progress – it’s about what we can build together.

I support Biden’s ban on assault weapons. I am in favor of his proposed billionaire tax so that working families don’t carry the brunt of any future economic slowdowns. I applaud Biden for leading us through a global pandemic and smashing records for job creation.

It’s time we got back to solving problems.
**[And that starts with us: Please, could you split a contribution of whatever you can to help us launch this grassroots campaign and build something that works for the people – not Kevin’s friends?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40165?t=13&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)**
I cannot thank you enough for your support.

Thank you,
Andy Morales
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6350%2E878179%2EApxT-L)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: The Blame Game
body:
Chinese Nationals are sneaking over the border. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. Get active posting content and maybe we will highlight some of what you share!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-j/) **Biden Passes Blame** In an interview with PBS, **[Biden admitted one of the documents hidden in his home is from 1974](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-t/).** He blames his staffers for packing up papers he should have. **State Dept Funded Disinformation Group** The U.S. State Department [**helped facilitate funding for a group that reportedly works to demonetize sites it claims are disseminating "disinformation**,"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-i/) including conservative news outlets. **Chinese Illegals** **[Border Patrol apprehensions of Chinese nationals crossing into the U.S. illegally](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-d/) **are currently up more than 800% when compared to the same time last year. **No Big Deal** Biden is defending his decision to wait several days to shoot down the Chinese spy balloon [**saying it was not a major breach of national security**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-h/) **Poor Hillary** Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton's trip to India to stump for "alternative clean energy" [**shows the 2016 presidential nominee is "envious" of President Biden.**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-k/) **Oh Canada** Illegals that have been bused to Canada **[are turning around in frustration because it is very cold and snowy. ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-u/)**

**Are You[ Ready to Laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-o/)?**
* That **[face you make](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* The **[resemblance](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-m/) i**s really amazing.
* **[Former Twitter employees](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhikjuk-trhiujldw-c/)** are having a rough time.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm embarrassed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61483725:s8JMHIDN6:m:1:2365227053:3D264A2CE2CB5C3DDE22D844FFB1D461:r)
Peter,

I'm embarrassed.

I'm embarrassed that Americans had to endure Joe Biden's State of the Union address.

As Biden stammered through his speech, we were met with a harsh reminder of just how far our nation has fallen under this regime's leadership.

You and I saw a President who has **no control and no real plan to fix our nation.**

Instead, his speech was riddled with communist promises and stories about his "struggles" growing up, hoping Americans would overlook his failures that have flushed America's economy down the drain.

_But we aren't buying it._

It's time for the new Republican House majority to undo the destruction caused by the Biden regime and restore President Trump's vision to put America First! | | | | [HELP ME FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61483725:s8JMHIDN6:m:1:2365227053:3D264A2CE2CB5C3DDE22D844FFB1D461:r)
---
I will continue to derail Biden's SOTU plan **to steal even more of YOUR tax dollars for his Democrat cronies to go on yet another spending spree.**

I will fight every attempt to return to the Washington status quo and ensure that reckless legislation like the $1.7 TRILLION Omnibus Spending Bill NEVER happens under our MAGA Majority!

I will protect our military from Biden's woke agenda so our brave men and women can defend our nation instead of worrying about the never-ending list of what the radical Leftists deem "offensive."

And I will uproot the politicization within the FBI and DOJ by exposing their attacks on American civil liberties, so no citizen has to worry about facing unjust assaults like President Trump had to endure.

**_Peter, Biden's SOTU address made it abundantly clear that our fight to put America First in Congress has never been so crucial._**

We are facing a Regime that is hell-bent on destroying everything America stands for.

But if we stay united and keep taking the fight to them, we can lift America out of the murky depths that the D.C. Swamp has plunged us into.

**That's why it's so important I ask you to join me[by giving a contribution of any amount TODAY to help me undo Biden's blunders and fight to put America First](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61483725:s8JMHIDN6:m:1:2365227053:3D264A2CE2CB5C3DDE22D844FFB1D461:r).**
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT: CHIP IN TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61483725:s8JMHIDN6:m:1:2365227053:3D264A2CE2CB5C3DDE22D844FFB1D461:r)
---
Thanks for standing strong,

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**

| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311545:JtOS7DGNa:m:1:3360412034:921A17467B7C5C015AF50038D4579841:r)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311545:JtOS7DGNa:m:1:3360412034:921A17467B7C5C015AF50038D4579841:r) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311545:JtOS7DGNa:m:1:3360412034:921A17467B7C5C015AF50038D4579841:r) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311545:JtOS7DGNa:m:1:3360412034:921A17467B7C5C015AF50038D4579841:r)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---

---

Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. name: Firearms Policy Coalition
subject: Tell Congress to stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Friend, President Biden is furious that Congress hasn't banned ALL of your guns yet. So he told ATF to do whatever it takes to restrict your rights and put millions of gun owners in the crosshairs. And now, just days ago, the ATF filed a MASSIVE, 238-page gun control regulation that will take effect in days... Unless you stand with us and ACT NOW. FPC works on the literal front lines of the 2A fight to defend YOUR rights and property. [**Friend, will you add your name right now to Firearms Policy Coalition's petition to Congress, telling our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**If history is a guide, this year we could see gun-grabbing politicians try to impose:**
* A BAN on all semiautomatics
* A BAN on standard-capacity gun magazines
* A BAN on buying guns without a permit
* A forced REGISTRATION of all firearms
* An expansion of "red flag" CONFISCATION
* And more

These anti-gun bills could soon be dropping without warning. And We the People must speak up and tell our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda before these dangerous policies get traction. [**Please add your name to FPC's urgent petition to Congress right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._vCe2lrA)
---
[Stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._OIkb4zif0Q)
---
This year, anti-gun tyrants will do everything they can to pass more legislation and increase federal power to restrict your rights. That's why our grassroots-powered movement to defend the Second Amendment, the Constitution, and your natural rights is more important than ever before. [**If you're on the side of FREEDOM, the CONSTITUTION, and the SECOND AMENDMENT, please sign your name to Firearms Policy Coalition's urgent petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) FPC is leading the fight to STOP anti-gun laws that infringe on the natural rights of peaceable people like yourself. While our opposition is well-funded by billionaires and special interests and has ARMIES of government lawyers, Firearms Policy Coalition has something they don't: freedom-loving Americans like you. This year could shape the future of the Second Amendment and YOUR rights for generations to come. [**Please stand with FPC in this important legal battle -- show your support by signing our petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Stay free,
---
Firearms Policy Coalition

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj3kg0dmlse2ttpa1u9tjghm9bsdgknpi7ge1up8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3hvntv4vslfpu0mfmnp76j5hl37jn25ittsgs1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zviqsr2f8s6fk8vamhk5ddkrqerrumh3a87r7nd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmev8mad3nsa89uu04pggi9mm9u12ah4jca9970g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvgi627f0a8boau2hupepe3g66qj693g9puvnldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztn5tk1r8f8nperuurbnr7pr45bq6su83h05norg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfr6dj7uang0s6tjofl0k0puceljpmv17joc1jrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zse1c055hiv2d0ed3e98522ks0q4ttkngns75mm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi6coj4cph2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

| | Friend, Tuesday night I was proud to deliver the State of the Union response. In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy. **It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. Chip in now to help make that happen:**

subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, February 11, 2023
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=omrjkkwjf&r=xshbbpphpvhc&s=ymfvkgppkwfwwtpffzscwykbgyywlgztylf&q=1676120400&a=view)

---
---
| |
###
---
| | [ Boring Politicians, Fights in School Hallways, and what Super Bowl commercials will be the hit this year ](http://click1.srnemail.com/cdmmclkkcsgfsszkfggntfqsvcfjlvvsdlnzvdgpdtjtgp_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
### _Friday, February 10, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at the Friday Finest. We talk some serious news with the Biden State of the Union and stupid school districts but we also talk the Super Bowl and the best part of the game which are the commercials! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/dpsjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhptdtrr_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
---|---
| [ Big is not always Bad ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vvjyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkpvfjfkh_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
### _Wednesday, February 8, 2023_
Today on the Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Robert Bork, Jr., who heads up The Anti Trust Education Project. We have a great discussion on getting back to the true meaning of Anti Trust law that is designed to protect consumers. Too often today the Left just yells that Big is Bad and unfortunately some on the Right have joined in. Today is a great education into a very important area of our economy that we cannot afford to lose. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ihdcmdttmrbwrrqtwbbfywzrpmwndpprhdfqphbvhynybd_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
| [ Eminem is 50 and I feel old, and other thoughts ](http://click1.srnemail.com/xvrcrbnnryptyyqntppmdtsykrtjbkkyvbmqkvphvdjdpj_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
### _Monday, February 6, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Jason Pye of the Due Process Institute, to discuss the EQUAL ACT in Congress that would change the disparity in sentencing between crack and powdered cocaine. We also discuss the breakdown in civil discourse in politics and take a look at the rise of the third party candidates. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/srcpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcvrbsbcl_upnffggwgqwcshfpfhqygyy.html)
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Pro-life hero David Daleiden needs your help
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the pric
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqjfgab6u3e5nc1h4kpme895fnj03ujiora299uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0vrajhhad6k0p2tgpjc0reuds95ghdfa3h6pgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9aaa2cc3covobarmrktfhi0bq4kl80huqk93gk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhvs9e62h71qd09ikh16o0cej4gbc641327t5p2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc1ulmmfp784rljna98nu49ts6c7cr9kikorrvmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlg99nt8ossh1drcg0vn460747lif7g6nadc3hu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrdidru83q9lh5jbnj7i0ok07dr6orh6gdjiefmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs)
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs02q9a1379bkuegu0eo1ctkt9e8db6n2orb016g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs)
---
[_Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation._](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztll9e69af1k0tpjeu8uip71hg937pf6h2fn4hp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8d90f2holojsv6hjpef0c6fdh7ankj3nu9rki5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z52t2bumb9n7vd4tgud9mnmhk2obodg2kjaasfu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zimnjv967j1fmsq08pc5cv82dof9meoa26j03e5o)

---
|
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1qh702njm2knjn1tldnk4hu601og2122p7bcoi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o74cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We have to stop this medical malpractice
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9g4r08dpvvv6jka3c85i39lmilp2mnbo60fpprg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6fvvv72omrg80qocsg9l58s2i3eib2uqnqh3tog_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z91f23p99um1gd6mtscbvob8hvb9j1m2f8kgos5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl3gh3j442e7ncephh5pgu7gjcgbkpqarenh3hfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z57ejs053kvn1dvq8otoncclfd1t2lsu4lrst080_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3qpv388c82nev4lnr17r44p2nd630b9amobgt90_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4sgvmpu213u5hipuri8cp2jtms385ft9ooigrmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zev3emvaqnemti89d2pecbcpp3qbecs51utc3it0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhm3ulq3tg19j1o1hb2nphdd5df03vq156oi9bn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c5h2bs)
---

---

---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z25q8s3lr8g5150rndrjrninjgph77n8nld0j1j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1rru6oaip783d6g0s0g4064mnodl0c1j8kq0t2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuck37hc9d4adhjo17nfcltu99d4pfrft6mfoc30_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chi66o72c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

body:

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05454%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dADwh5iSnpuze7%2f0brbRxQ&sysid=1)

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05453%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G92KtaSGmEUQkkJ%2b3BTQPw&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05465%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NWFVC0G75UsxHFoOq%2ft2fQ&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05453%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G92KtaSGmEUQkkJ%2b3BTQPw&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05466%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nFQpdTl8tWhpgZOdUKVZhg&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05467%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L7lAak6%2bCYWSqSfJxQ34ug&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05468%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TCWg%2bMUxVKlcpMHDhawEPA&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zed5odun9pkbestrnjsujt8gn7l0cihl8btb0si0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbr20ohea3ecjgkud5ar4sckln9smbcqi5etrus0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdp8dfsno9dur3i5j8sculnm856t9hu6v2utu4r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmi7uvkbstik6hr68rcptcr252qoscmk96hdc1h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjure07mcljm01u1jd9k4st2bgjlbcg4gvoa3njo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0q39tmupin95p1ttnt29c3oqemfvqd7djg13gh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh60ob6c3h2bs)
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILLPAC
body:
|

---
| | | **_FIRST:_ Biden sat back while China bought up millions of acres of American farmland

_THEN:_ He sold thousands of barrels of oil from our strategic petroleum reserve to China

_NOW_ : He's allowing China to fly surveillance balloons across our country**
Every act of aggression that China makes towards our nation is met by an uncaring President who is happy to relinquish our sovereignty to the Communist party of China.

**As a former Captain in the United States Air Force** , this kind of disregard for the safety of our nation is something I've never witnessed before. And frankly, it DISGUSTS me.

As a patriot, a veteran, and someone who LOVES our country, I won't sit back and let China walk over Biden. So will you join me? name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Did you feel disrespected by Biden’s speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Biden just spent an hour LYING to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country.
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If Biden's speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310650:Jw9CaDGN0:m:1:3299561967:EE7E91CE420366CEA2109E1BA368FAFC:r)
---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

I just found the [**weirdest, yet most useful EDC (every day carry) gadget**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11570/6374453/5b1bdb9a5b759590e977198f5ed8b5635c725011/989ff56b34d84a7081048a45c3a58cf9c9607a40) I’ve ever seen before online... And it hasn't left my pocket since the day I got it. I literally can't imagine my life without it now. Even if you have all the EDC gear you think you need... You're going to want to see [**THIS.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11570/6374453/5b1bdb9a5b759590e977198f5ed8b5635c725011/989ff56b34d84a7081048a45c3a58cf9c9607a40) Because it's unlike anything I've ever laid my eyes on (I don't say that lightly). After buying one for myself, I contacted the company who sells them (The Tactical Brotherhood) and asked them if we could give some away for FREE to my readers. The owner agreed to give away 500 for FREE to help get his brand name out there. However, I just sent this email out to *number of people on your list* action oriented preppers.. So if they run out by the time you [**click here,**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11570/6374453/5b1bdb9a5b759590e977198f5ed8b5635c725011/989ff56b34d84a7081048a45c3a58cf9c9607a40)[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11570/6374453/5b1bdb9a5b759590e977198f5ed8b5635c725011/989ff56b34d84a7081048a45c3a58cf9c9607a40) I apologize. There'll be more free gear in the future... But nothing as interesting as this.

| | Friend, On Tuesday night I was proud to deliver the State of the Union response. In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy. **It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. Chip in now to help make that happen:**

name: Live Biden Poll via Team Gillibrand
subject: Friend: Did you miss this email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---

| | Fellow conservative, Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsskfvkc9hmbmf68ekrku9jag8gauj2d2r3a5bs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chh62o31cth2bs)

**Hello Peter,**
---
**I wish to “Thank You” for your support in 2022!** We are beginning the 2024 campaign and need your continued support now, in 2023, for the 2024 win. ▪ I support our veterans, first responders, teachers, and great nation.
▪ I will work to reduce taxes on Social Security payments.
▪ I will work to keep our veteran's health benefits.
▪ **Our citizens, country, and state are of the utmost importance to me.**
▪ I will defend our freedoms and liberty.

I am planning on giving some money to the 1776 Project. I think a lot of other people should as well because, without an enormous amount of resources, they are flipping school boards all over the country.” **_ **\- Ben Shapiro**

My name is Ryan Girdusky, I founded the 1776 Project PAC and over the last year and a half, I have been traveling the country, working with conservative school board candidates who are determined to take back our schools from the crazed radical left. **In ONE YEAR we have already flipped over 100 school board seats from liberal to conservative!** _AND 70% of ALL the candidates we’ve supported have won their races._ Friend, the ONLY way to save our children from leftist indoctrination and Critical Race Theory is to take back our schools, one county at a time. And we’ve proven that, with your help, we CAN and WILL do it. **[Will you join the movement to take back our schools from the ground up with a donation of $17.76 or more today?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05472%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nOEOR1%2fBJ%2f3Pc2JDQgdDLw&sysid=1)** For too long our schools have been run by people who hate our country and don’t share our values. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=39b578f533424def98f13052f62f11c4&_e=Vc-BrrkXDP1gdMhcpGQ_h59nZJW4ABTaOd6cNdaPHttSi6oL6ZyUpNlkiAUUIHuI-c4JRJmATxRUXCyfNFcUvIwkBoWUi_fP9AJhMJDx4-ijUvugLHPVW7lyhRTy7PkwwUvDJfjDqyD_5QUl3U2wbl_EdV0BwH74qqbD7LiuVdBqH2VBC_whIRpwX_b6KubOIop0WZrauwU1DooZ7A1uL4xDZ-AscMCin3qUvaDxIqLBD92VnOGhSm5O_ChbyCiCVS4QhmdBRFgx8XEn_hJ26owPH47YMNEjl4WsCMmOY8cDjKQZIIxu74FXch3p1JYc)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=39b578f533424def98f13052f62f11c4&_e=Vc-BrrkXDP1gdMhcpGQ_h59nZJW4ABTaOd6cNdaPHttSi6oL6ZyUpNlkiAUUIHuI-c4JRJmATxRUXCyfNFcUvIwkBoWUi_fP9AJhMJDx4-ijUvugLHPVW7lyhRTy7PkwwUvDJfjDqyD_5QUl3U2wbkEZ72gSWkLXEax6dhuIw6PH9sTMJLlkTSqn2CCwTQnFFVJzh6YgE2QtZ6CF_E6GxyvrHP8kD_WgA8sZ7OPE4x2d93SnSjWp8jHqSlMpJUZmUxSvnPslIO9klratt8q6OS23-SPEFYiq7WESneQdZF8cXstvGi4X7JWaN9clZxXN)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=39b578f533424def98f13052f62f11c4&_e=Vc-BrrkXDP1gdMhcpGQ_h59nZJW4ABTaOd6cNdaPHttSi6oL6ZyUpNlkiAUUIHuI-c4JRJmATxRUXCyfNFcUvIwkBoWUi_fP9AJhMJDx4-ijUvugLHPVW7lyhRTy7PkwwUvDJfjDqyD_5QUl3U2wbusK1KWc7dRU8IlbNjZ8KrsggqkocFCV2RzUovlbXnPngU5ifIteEvkmlb91bAz7Czz1mJHGhO3mV9hQqRLpCxz92SKN8UEmutRiIXd7YkH8ufCzrNos-bXHnlrpGtFIJltFMMgyr2AWt3ItcVV90Z_Uf5mGHxBjVbtPjriyxLhF)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=39b578f533424def98f13052f62f11c4&_e=Vc-BrrkXDP1gdMhcpGQ_h59nZJW4ABTaOd6cNdaPHttSi6oL6ZyUpNlkiAUUIHuI-c4JRJmATxRUXCyfNFcUvIwkBoWUi_fP9AJhMJDx4-ijUvugLHPVW7lyhRTy7PkwwUvDJfjDqyD_5QUl3U2wbpYepuiFGarRR_4iJSPuwJ3WD205svOiWflRCEz_v41i-lmt7C6l7IHe4utLhESzaYS6oBepZLDpANoxAex7q-n6u_YYW5XpqA3RKQRtxQCm1IAy9jUhk3DVQ4MHErMkrrtq1uWo2-8FnbBJUN3TZLURSpyCTssXO8k4WFJ-Kyr9)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=39b578f533424def98f13052f62f11c4&_e=Vc-BrrkXDP1gdMhcpGQ_h59nZJW4ABTaOd6cNdaPHttSi6oL6ZyUpNlkiAUUIHuI-c4JRJmATxRUXCyfNFcUvIwkBoWUi_fP9AJhMJDx4-ijUvugLHPVW7lyhRTy7PkwwUvDJfjDqyD_5QUl3U2wbkM0zG2e9xmbs2BWAQ1xXAcKkNzAIJsQ7NJJ-jwq_t-Pq2ooqdlHs5bwWte0NF1pb44Y9G2py5SOpTm3WL8HDPnAsKbPcSmT_BhQiA0Leh9NjcNRTrVwlzZxh8mdzFHw4iFmEAS3rETh8YCfdHC86T4jsu5qqmQCTaUSIgUO638e)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. name: Full Mag News
subject: They were known as the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

| | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c548760ba8504ebbbf322656d68efefd&_e=vOS-fDHKBu-JbR6WGkNjcL5JiGqvr2DxyiNmKTerfTwsoHwIAcEmxzYxS3YmgDvAWxLOW6hZUufBKR-n1zVAVaJtGcLWS9K2BFvmgiN2U464pRvh604j0w-WY-Cs0L2-76GVyOCb3lAPQA_IsjDh1rN4zwXC7oShhi4LMLEWS88bMPEr5r9etPSTSIelj97yBVrZmGtIahJiWWNJy4a3Gj6LcfWRzlT65s03ZeBsH0B2ubcsmMY9pgeIf7BOxyvi8szt9jaWawkgFlG54qylIkWYhoVyCw1_Zh8YSchTrqShZV7mwUyvNApkxxjKah77kO1XTtbzuhO_4vissECq0Fg6bt95ntnbVYOO3EbdlINRd25xqjQ8_0dzGT0nX2-a)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c548760ba8504ebbbf322656d68efefd&_e=vOS-fDHKBu-JbR6WGkNjcL5JiGqvr2DxyiNmKTerfTwsoHwIAcEmxzYxS3YmgDvAWxLOW6hZUufBKR-n1zVAVaJtGcLWS9K2BFvmgiN2U464pRvh604j0w-WY-Cs0L2-76GVyOCb3lAPQA_IsjDh1rN4zwXC7oShhi4LMLEWS88bMPEr5r9etPSTSIelj97yBVrZmGtIahJiWWNJy4a3Gj6LcfWRzlT65s03ZeBsH0AmFdpqRWGKlU1fw6c2DKai4ZvWD1-Kp3N7tBgPjwfTYGh5csamKCSwBzzVvdUgnZiTzUKcpM_-jjnQNp7tShZHPNdNUKdjGwoL0HqDyvnGkUtbIGiZrsIs3x-gP854EHMaoNtPJfyz7XXzb0JC803J)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c548760ba8504ebbbf322656d68efefd&_e=vOS-fDHKBu-JbR6WGkNjcL5JiGqvr2DxyiNmKTerfTwsoHwIAcEmxzYxS3YmgDvAWxLOW6hZUufBKR-n1zVAVaJtGcLWS9K2BFvmgiN2U464pRvh604j0w-WY-Cs0L2-76GVyOCb3lAPQA_IsjDh1rN4zwXC7oShhi4LMLEWS88bMPEr5r9etPSTSIelj97yBVrZmGtIahJiWWNJy4a3Gj6LcfWRzlT65s03ZeBsH0DKtBmTtou4KVk7PkcweSP36ZPCwHvy8y6cVQiS_hqUZT9bQSa_t6X5-W0x1ZcTE_1bBpNeRedZARhNZFtybrFQxE2SFzKIsi7u-KmrnurA1cNzGkco7g9Ta1UO8wrpNs2WVDt4ORo148QHH9mtquwF)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c548760ba8504ebbbf322656d68efefd&_e=vOS-fDHKBu-JbR6WGkNjcL5JiGqvr2DxyiNmKTerfTwsoHwIAcEmxzYxS3YmgDvAWxLOW6hZUufBKR-n1zVAVaJtGcLWS9K2BFvmgiN2U464pRvh604j0w-WY-Cs0L2-76GVyOCb3lAPQA_IsjDh1rN4zwXC7oShhi4LMLEWS88bMPEr5r9etPSTSIelj97yBVrZmGtIahJiWWNJy4a3Gj6LcfWRzlT65s03ZeBsH0DsfbrZZfbaqMEhLJ98rNfcKp_uoPdcdm_2l_nCPFwQ0zrGiinHKgC2ezTh1FbXHrz8pM0Ci6eaR9rgH1yPWfKUPPGk9hQSXpXqUJVjH-DGN_6jBfNeEAeMs1Y1bX1vxYsWqkpW3wQ4cv9LnZU-E2iw)**

---
| |
---

In the radical left's America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy. **It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| | | America has real problems to solve and challenges to face. But House Republicans have decided the top priority is ["investigations" into conspiracy theory nonsense](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9e795a3-d9c5-4b21-bf0a-041112bad05d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) e.g., Hunter Biden's laptop, how Trump really won the 2020 election, and the audacity of the government charging Republican criminals... with crimes.

**This is a complete waste of time, and is being done solely to placate the most idiotic part of the Republican base -- and their leader in Mar-a-Lago.**

Enough already. This has to stop, and it has to stop NOW.

[**Tell House Republicans to stop wasting time on idiotic "investigations."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b65c8ab-939d-4e6f-ad4b-6925b88cbfce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend, Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

I'm only sending this hail mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the endzone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone.

Can you rush $8 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the left in their tracks?

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Important, Please Read: Make Caucuses Great Again
body:
From Erik Aadland
| | | |
---
---
|
# Make Our Republican Caucuses Great Again
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
------Since being enacted through law in 1910, caucuses have been one of the prime bedrocks of Colorado politics. When done well, caucuses serve as an energizing political influence, a rallying point for bringing like-minded people together to exchange ideas, to discuss what is important to them, and to determine which candidates should move forward onto each party's primary ballot. For candidates without significant funds, this is the grassroots process for making the ballot, and it involves tremendous blood, sweat and tears; trust me, I know having made the Congressional District 7 ballot through the caucus process. I am also a Precinct Committee Person (PCP).
------Unfortunately, participation in the Republican caucus in the past several election cycles has dwindled to a point where many precincts across the state have little to no membership, leaving many counties under-represented at State GOP assemblies. When the caucuses have low participation, candidates selected for the primary ballot may not fully represent the ideals of the registered voters for a particular party. Furthermore, when precincts are unfilled, counties lose precious access to would-be volunteers, miss significant opportunities to garner support for candidates, and overall voter turnout is harmed statewide.
This isn't good for Republicans and winning elections; we must turn this around quickly and Make our Republican Caucuses Great Again.
---
# Here is the way forward:
---
## 1) We must attract participation to the caucuses.
---
| |
---|---
|
This begins with clear communication (advertising) regarding dates, times and locations in every county, well in advance of the caucus. We should also make our caucuses festive and fun to attend, especially to attract younger voters. Cash bar anyone? Caucuses are a phenomenal way to meet like-minded people who share similar values.
| |
---
---
|
## 2) We must educate Republicans on the purpose, value, and importance of the caucus system.
---
| | |
---|---
|
We must have persistent outreach to convince Republicans that their time is well-spent being involved in the caucus, or in assuming a leadership role in their county's caucus process. We must educate voters about the critical role caucuses play in selecting candidates.
|
---
## 3) We must train county leaders, district captains, precinct committee people and volunteers on how to execute a well-run caucus.
---
| |
---|---
|
The official Republican Party of Colorado must help county leadership succeed by arming them with training, voter data, and the funds to run an exciting, well-attended caucus. This should include virtual and in-person training.
| |
---
## 4) We must fund the caucus process in every county
---
| |
---|---
|
For counties to successfully run their caucus, they must have the appropriate funds to do so; funding will go towards advertising, recruiting, and training. The state party must assist counties' fundraising efforts.
|
---
------Currently, there are many advocates for discarding the caucus system altogether. One argument is the significant time, energy, and effort to run the caucus does not have an equivalent dividend. Another is that ballot access should be more streamlined to reduce the strain on candidates seeking access to the ballot. A third, and perhaps the most compelling argument, is the currently low participation of voters in the caucus. We face a crossroads where there are advocates for removing the process altogether.
---
------For the caucus to endure, and to aid Republicans in winning elections, we must make the caucus successful, ensuring it is efficient, funded, well-attended, and a means of positively promoting conservative values.
---
------What I propose is that we make our caucuses great again, revitalizing the process in a way that inspires Republicans, restores fun to the process, increases voter turnout, selects the best, most winnable candidates and serves as a way of compelling our party to victory.
------It can be done, should be done, and as the next Chairman of the Colorado GOP, I will see it done.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LFIMFQyDMeXBZtmwxIA1HI3rvsadFEZv40t60LHQS59kafqfEHEwqki-2_0ge__XZbLMpd_hpPgbIjUjRBxQxdj8u7QNlvMwOP2_lQwxky8xXFEmILVwImtINMYI3oZaQvqVVphCJiwspNv5wh3mYnCElF_DhcZ784MsmuPXURjrE-e-YqdwWZQXNpAa1n5aK0fKlUbbSc=&c=PseiuzjyeiUos0Z0wx4k4CBEdqR3O0ZEuqRYzZQAqCqzSah9HRQXPw==&ch=JDsbYGQ0Nz1y1Tz_vzz2f6YLRcmmCXzJ5JbuC-7J8OCiufNWJpyagg==)
---
|
---
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LFIMFQyDMeXBZtmwxIA1HI3rvsadFEZv40t60LHQS59kafqfEHEwqTJk0JVhBguFyPajj6I-iYEBSKSpeAMZHzzLRyfM33vpPE4hgDrJ6B7wJncB9fwN3CfM758loNR1VyuKn9aKamokdfWnEFStLyEpvnhUrkQTM-QRhJ37PC9tcpJZqIipakktm4NOsD86NSMvqCUvGM=&c=PseiuzjyeiUos0Z0wx4k4CBEdqR3O0ZEuqRYzZQAqCqzSah9HRQXPw==&ch=JDsbYGQ0Nz1y1Tz_vzz2f6YLRcmmCXzJ5JbuC-7J8OCiufNWJpyagg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LFIMFQyDMeXBZtmwxIA1HI3rvsadFEZv40t60LHQS59kafqfEHEwuTt5ySFZjhDDnpEK-6SbHelSK3SvJCVuzsB1FZJSBFQBDOGEOTkNl1XZ6OCUTH4E1-0tAgBbFKNmZsF8HTfNP2yxbwR5KGOnTD7qMJz2wrZ9XzepPMgYALMW7TEv85u0w==&c=PseiuzjyeiUos0Z0wx4k4CBEdqR3O0ZEuqRYzZQAqCqzSah9HRQXPw==&ch=JDsbYGQ0Nz1y1Tz_vzz2f6YLRcmmCXzJ5JbuC-7J8OCiufNWJpyagg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LFIMFQyDMeXBZtmwxIA1HI3rvsadFEZv40t60LHQS59kafqfEHEwqTJk0JVhBguVo4TxlMj5b7-LQX0CLu_VuAN4y-5Ll5fcrBF8j1FlO4oNM0n4lXPGrNnlKkYiygZYR2PJTddyYdp2hov42uPbNkG6A3d7Tt0&c=PseiuzjyeiUos0Z0wx4k4CBEdqR3O0ZEuqRYzZQAqCqzSah9HRQXPw==&ch=JDsbYGQ0Nz1y1Tz_vzz2f6YLRcmmCXzJ5JbuC-7J8OCiufNWJpyagg==)

Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left.
