name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: We must put an end to the woke Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this message is a bit longer than usual, so I want to thank you in advance for taking the time to hear me out.

Many of my neighbors in Miami are immigrants from countries wrecked by socialist regimes. They came to America because they saw it as a land of liberty and common sense, free from the Marxist ideologies that turned their homelands into places of oppression. But times are changing. **Today, they see the same insanity that gripped their homelands infiltrating the United States -- and being embraced by the Democrat Party.**
_Critical race theory.
Radical gender ideology.
Pro-abortion fanaticism.
Anti-religious discrimination._
Ideas that originated on the fringe of American politics and were long relegated to Ivy League faculty lounges and socialist cells are now commonplace across major institutions, from Hollywood to the legacy media to Wall Street. **Believing that the United States is an evil empire and that men can get pregnant are now the litmus test for elite status.**

In America, people are allowed to fill their heads with nonsense if they want to. **However, no one is entitled to force that nonsense on others.**

The Biden White House is one of the worst offenders. Under the leadership of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion "experts" and a president held captive by his party's extremist base, this administration is:
* Financing **racist curricula in public schools**
* Advocating the use of **untested and unapproved puberty blockers on children**
* And turning the Department of Veterans Affairs into a **post-Roe abortion factory**
* _**... And doing all this on taxpayer dollars**_

---
| | | [HELP MARCO STOP THIS!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311969:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "HELP MARCO STOP THIS!")
---
Meanwhile, instead of responding to record-low recruitment numbers or modernizing our dangerously out-of-date military in a time of increasing great power competition, **Biden 's Pentagon is wasting valuable resources on _drag queen story hours_ , _sensitivity training_ , and countless other _woke priorities._**

This is simply unacceptable, a radical imposition on millions of Americans who see abortion as the killing of an innocent human being, who think kids should be safe from dangerous drugs and sexualized pageantry, and who rely on our military to defend them from foreign threats, not engage in social engineering. **The government and woke institutions are colluding against common sense, and our communities and children are suffering as a result.**
**This brings me to my main point: I am leading the fight in the U.S. Senate to protect America against radical woke activism in all its forms.**
**_[If you support my fight to stop woke ideology from infiltrating every aspect of our lives, I humbly ask that you consider making a donation of any amount.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311968:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "If you support my fight to stop woke ideology from infiltrating every aspect of our lives, I
humbly ask that you consider making a donation of any amount.")_ Every single dollar we raise goes towards our efforts to restore the American Dream and take back our country from the radical Left. **
---
| | | [DONATE TO HELP MARCO STOP WOKEISM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311968:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "DONATE
TO HELP MARCO STOP WOKEISM")
---
If we become a country where left-wing protestors are exempt from the law, Wall Street wields investors' dollars as a weapon against conservatives, and the U.S. government undermines the national interest, we won't last long. **Common-sense policymakers have a duty to hold elites accountable and prevent wokeness from turning the land of the free into another socialist wasteland.**

If you've made it this far, thank you so much for reading this in its entirety. I truly appreciate your support.

Thank you,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311968:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r)
---
Senator Marco Rubio
---
| | | [STOP WOKEISM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311969:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "STOP WOKEISM")
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311967:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "My parents lost their country. I'm not
going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311967:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311967:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311966:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the
filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311966:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE LEFT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62311966:Jl4ifDGON:m:1:3331421248:757A76A5ABC5ED4A9DEEDBB3FE6C2C0D:r "STOP THE DEMS")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Sarah Huckabee Sanders shows how it should be done – update from Mississippi’s free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132804?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**After President Biden’s State of the Union Address, Sarah Huckabee Sanders delivered the Republican response. **

The day after that the newly elected governor of Arkansas did something even more impressive: **she outlined plans for universal school choice in her state.

Under the Huckabee Sanders plan every family in Arkansas will be given an Education Freedom Account for each child by 2025.** This will allow moms and dads to enroll their kids in whatever school is most appropriate for their family – “public, private, parochial, or homeschool”.
---
|
---
_Sarah Huckabee Sanders speaking in Jackson, Mississippi_
| **If Arkansas can do that, why can’t we? **Are things so wildly different on the other side of the river? Are the vested interests who would rather take your tax dollars to fund the education system, as opposed actual students, magically stronger in our state? Not at all.

**A conservative education revolution is happening across much of America – and we could be part of it. **Utah and Iowa passed laws to allow school choice last month. Florida, Texas and Wyoming are embarking on something similar. Arizona and West Virginia have already implemented school choice.

**Conservative leadership in Mississippi needs to make sure we are part of the school choice revolution, too.**

What is so refreshing about the Huckabee Sanders approach is that she is gloriously unapologetic. **Instead of kowtowing to vested interests that would rather hog-tie the legislature into do-nothing inertia, she is taking them on head-on. **

Governor Huckabee Sanders is reaching over the heads of those that believe the purpose of the education budget is to provide jobs, and appealing directly to families. Rather than dwell on why it can’t be done, she is doing it.

**Huckabee Sanders is not content to tinker like a technocrat with the detail of her state’s education system.** She is not looking to move a couple of metrics that half the state’s parents probably don’t even know exist, let alone care for. She is instead driving forward changes that will elevate the education system as experienced by families each day.

**Joining us in a few weeks will be another great champion of school choice, Betsy DeVos.** A former education secretary in the Trump administration, Mrs. DeVos is in my opinion one of the most inspirational conservatives in the country. She will be highlighting how school choice can transform the lives of young Americans of every background.

**If you support school choice, please come to hear Betsy DeVos outline her vision for the future of education in America. Click on the image below to book your ticket today. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f1462d67de&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image to reserve your tickets_
| We need to move the dial on school choice in this state – I hope you will join us as we lead the charge to make it happen. If Arkansas can do it, we can too.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d7f655b1cb&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _

subject: Marge Taylor Greene was her classy self at SOTU, screaming "liar at the President. Then, he publicly owned her. See how!
body:
The Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc8b0996-5340-4997-82be-cdc18c45d8a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action's "BlueLetter" (Newsletter) Is Here!_** * 👍👍 Did [President Biden hit his State of the Union (SOTU) Speech outta the park](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8dfac14a-c8fd-4180-8d6c-7ffeb3f34435/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)? Did he meet/surpass expectations?? [Here are pre-speech predictions on The Mary Trump Show," see for yourself](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d508738-b81a-45e7-ac73-853d07499fa5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MNQL3QLMppk&t=4s](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee7ec36b-670a-46be-b25a-3eae3d2cf1a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * 😱 Who's [the one Democrat in which the Russians invested funds](https://default.salsalabs.org/T882aa06a-4301-4a88-869c-2eb445eb6c49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)? [You may be surprised (then again, you may not](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfe43e8f-b27f-46c7-920c-55634570c56d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/qlY5Us-anp4](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa6fc7bc-153e-4ea7-88bb-efd97252ceae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Marge Taylor Greene was her classy self at SOTU, [screaming "liar at the President](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7276930-1ed0-4b41-a6cb-9c95889a6871/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Then, [he publicly owned her. See how](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91a3cc4f-dc26-4942-a561-34e0a78e0612/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ElnBxBPuOB0&t=16s](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te228292a-ff5d-4c80-a7d1-851a55d358d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **Have [you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dfe8468-d3a0-4d0c-a954-872dbc4a6539/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7dadda2-be87-49cf-83e2-181fecd296f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T724c3255-1dca-4dd7-9cc2-d41eb043f735/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* * A [simple glaring fact makes clear how Donald Trump's owned by Russia](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5837a19-64b7-478e-91c3-9c510b6b663c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/EgAhZxesHmw](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bda37d2-f665-4bff-a20b-3dfee6b0bdaa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \- Additionally, [new knowledge now public on how the Russians originally approached Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc24af15-abfa-4c04-b6be-fd223151972d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lH14y9C3oDw](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8d48c4f-78b5-418d-9843-1e4066a631e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * After the 2022 MAGA Midterm disaster, [they really picked hardcore Trump loyalist & serial liar Sarah Huck-a-Buck Sanders to respond to Biden because they thought she'd appeal to Gen Z](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5288e80-7ce3-42d5-953a-2b515738d61e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)?!? 😁🙃😁 [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lAAWbcM1Zvs](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7befb5b7-ae73-436b-9cf8-2f05d12db0c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Have A Great Weekend!! Cliff ******************* **PS[: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6995df4-6ade-44f5-9f21-2e1be26c4bab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began!** Also: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta692ec29-65af-40b5-805e-418d0bf5df24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te92571d7-95f3-41f8-bc4a-f1caf130c532/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[ New Jersey council member Russell Heller was found shot in his car at the PSE&G; facility in Franklin Township just at 7 a.m. Wednesday. This comes exactly one week after Councilwoman Eunice Dwumfour was killed. body:
Donald Trump can’t be allowed back in the White House

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58578364/391553255/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM5ZmVlZi0xOWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcQNXeczdgtcVc0FHFHzl3dYbbmGrSblPrlKCpfqvgc=&emci=8283dc8e-a7a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=32c9feef-19aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | **Here are the facts:**
1. Donald Trump is right now the frontrunner for the GOP nomination for President.
2. Donald Trump has threatened to create politically motivated witch trials to persecute his enemies and everyone who he sees as having wronged him.
3. Georgia voters stopped him in 2020.
4. _**Georgia voters are going to stop him again in 2024._**

Trump released a video where he talks about how he wants to go after his political enemies and set up sham investigations, and while Donald Trump is one of America’s most incompetent presidents, he’s also one of our most vindictive ones. So here’s the bottom line: **_we cannot allow Donald Trump to return to the White House in 2024._**

That’s why we’re starting to organize NOW in Georgia. We know that he’s furious he lost Georgia in 2020, and he knows that if he loses Georgia again in 2024, it’s all over. [**_So please, rush a donation of $10, $15, or whatever you can afford, to our “Stop Donald Trump” fund as we work to keep Georgia (and the White House) blue!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58578365/391553256/710125701?refcode=20230211.1_DPG_2R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM5ZmVlZi0xOWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcQNXeczdgtcVc0FHFHzl3dYbbmGrSblPrlKCpfqvgc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

During the 2021-2022 election cycle, The Collective PAC contributed over approximately $700,000 to help elect our candidates through direct contributions to their campaigns. We also bundled over $333,823 for federal and statewide candidates from tens of thousands of our members and donors. The direct investments made to these campaigns were able to help our candidates establish and grow their voter outreach and engagement initiatives. Additionally, we highlighted our endorsed candidates through our email and social media platforms and worked directly with many of our candidates on earned media outreach and revamping their social media efforts.

In 2022, The Collective PAC organized 11 text banks with over 900 volunteers engaging in voter contact for some of our high priority races in Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Minnesota, Ohio, New York, Nevada, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Through these organizing efforts, we were able to reach over 3.1 million Black voters, encouraging them to use their power at the ballot box.

**January in Review**
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1lwc_dEwEoNkY4UCHwT390ZePiP8uMIkYYglHDqkGNNut9d48qcOGMN4ThrUtFU8Q6vO38t-X-PkItkF_EzvYnXGw7JgsFW0EuTlETuLVz-w39aSu5c9-fckmZQ1uyCzMY4PHWpRURNlj-stlnCibj7Vos-1xOUWNJNUFb82WF_82fYc1RmGuyYHhj7vdrvTfJSnwXyVPYNpDcVeDl7hhDoY_6PUkdipsen7uh8vBJIBHmm0nkxF8Cqzouf2FWWQZTTPPygeJRHc20kWLlsgLvOM6cQYqMCBwl8xukqyYfN5MJceht0F7OIwqr-VeCvV--diH6v9wd_-fG8zOqpJwf7_hGDJnDo_5S2qvahfcoYKO/3tm/sX3A0XdASJ-uUta3pgZZuA/h5/yN4FlgChZ84vdEjqb8goOK9TyajuUt--7IyL6AY5zjU)
This past January we saw the historic inaugurations of Maryland’s first Black Governor, Wes Moore; Pennsylvania’s first Black Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis; the first Black Attorneys General of Massachusetts and Maryland, Andrea Campbell and Anthony Brown, respectively; and Connectitut’s first Black State Treasurer, Erick Russel. January also saw the swearing in of the largest class of the Congressional Black Caucus in U.S. history.

The Collective PAC collaborated with our partners from The Latino Victory Fund and AAPI Victory Fund to host the first-ever Tri-Caucus swearing-in and welcome reception for members of the 118th Congress on Wednesday, January 4, 2023. There were over 15 Members of Congress from the Black, Latinx, and AANHPI communities at the gathering. Several senior staff from the White House and U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Marcia Fudge were also in attendance.

**The Work Ahead**
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1lwc_dEwEoNkY4UCHwT390ZePiP8uMIkYYglHDqkGNNut9d48qcOGMN4ThrUtFU8Q6v7I_t2RZDuYlGtAQj7m3fsRchcFXCwfqpxnh-MQLPwS3EjKru8dx_Qoo_-9YVjAM0bRj7JFjeaAZq5dZ97Sc1Q3sPZQwrjBFYxvoAVSHudmiilLoWQ7IYJPiWRrtfHW8c1es-92-lQ1C_WJrOpX4x71j_hyQFYTK4s5lYcQcb3CkeD9JyKWIyMVtQ4mcpjna_NdH_tweaytO3RPtY15jrLUegk5EWjF00PwKE9ZLyGhguOm2FCkDvMpfE1YxT8apxAEwI0krU5lZRh6g_X4aj7PhbdiQFLw2UKd_n2MA9J4/3tm/sX3A0XdASJ-uUta3pgZZuA/h12/N84oRGoo6U3zlj4VQCEK5Kric2LfwBoTDHogGaaDtiM)
So far this cycle, The Collective PAC has endorsed [Virginia State Senator Jennifer McClellan](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcqzzG-vGlFlNiAIBTFgBPj40e8wPtkrq5-55W-TUBWE908vm9usU7yOooS8XyMLIzvbMnXAzayOniDh_3Zy0TXObQ5GENzuH1k0zYRpzVnwZw38inMs1sleS1SyrR3vbBRA5528sEmy-rpVSBYuCf37BR5nrj9zJ1z5wpvQe4ANUGef387Q7ZAmRTdoWyZQUpa31BaNPUyhI6Q23B7UjHrSWdGZObG4oJ2Mq1FZD7BYgvakm-S-R5PCO_UoqpMEA9oUFzmv71USR3xrih956NA6pUUzmgQRB6MIA5CrvAMYMZadHl7OixNpDa1TjXVFHaafcPdpwJ0W6b-wDrpfoY8vbYG9MgWIbPzHey-U475D6oe-t_GlSHNJgcNZA4WVpSSIvUtLAtd9OJuSbizKM8r1uetwCGKNTRW1j1FVyGoB2uwKeASowNqzjOX-yOvg5x52c81HBEreqn1oj2rVew3ow/3tm/sX3A0XdASJ-uUta3pgZZuA/h13/ZIOik0RgGkNKnTkA3_AoOjiPqmLuaigdDjWOaAG73B0) for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District in February’s upcoming special election to fill the seat of the late Representative Donald McEachin. If elected, Senator McClellan will become the first Black woman to represent the commonwealth of Virginia in the U.S. House of Representatives.

Our ultimate goal is to endorse at least 100 Black candidates running for state and local office in 2023, as we work to expand Black representation across all levels of government. Specifically, our priority states for statewide and state legislative races are: Kentucky, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Jersey, and Virginia. We will also focus on several mayoral races in key major cities across the country including Chicago, Denver, Houston and Philadelphia.

When we have elected officials who reflect and respect the diversity of our communities, we have a government that is more effective and more responsive to the needs of their constituents. We know that the ripple effect of this election as it pertains to the prowess of Black candidates, will be felt for years to come.

**The Collective in the News**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | The Collective PAC’s Investment and Impact During the 2021-2022 election cycle, The Collective PAC contributed over approximately $700,000 to help elect our candidates through direct contributions to their campaigns. We also bundled over $333,823 for federal and statewide candidates from tens of thousands of our members and donors. The direct investments made to these campaigns were able to help our candidates establish and grow their voter outreach and engagement initiatives. Additionally, we highlighted our endorsed candidates through our email and social media platforms and worked directly with many of our candidates on earned media outreach and revamping their social media efforts. In 2022, The Collective PAC organized 11 text banks with over 900 volunteers engaging in voter contact for some of our high priority races in Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Minnesota, Ohio, New York, Nevada, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Through these organizing efforts, we were able to reach over 3.1 million Black voters, encouraging them to use their power at the ballot box. | | ---|--- January in Review This past January we saw the historic inaugurations of Maryland’s first Black Governor, Wes Moore; Pennsylvania’s first Black Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis; the first Black Attorneys General of Massachusetts and Maryland, Andrea Campbell and Anthony Brown, respectively; and Connectitut’s first Black State Treasurer, Erick Russel. January also saw the swearing in of the largest class of the Congressional Black Caucus in U.S. history. The Collective PAC collaborated with our partners from The Latino Victory Fund and AAPI Victory Fund to host the first-ever Tri-Caucus swearing-in and welcome reception for members of the 118th Congress on Wednesday, January 4, 2023. There were over 15 Members of Congress from the Black, Latinx, and AANHPI communities at the gathering. Several senior staff from the White House and U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Marcia Fudge were also in attendance. | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- The Work Ahead So far this cycle, The Collective PAC has endorsed for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District in February’s upcoming special election to fill the seat of the late Representative Donald McEachin. If elected, Senator McClellan will become the first Black woman to represent the commonwealth of Virginia in the U.S. House of Representatives. Our ultimate goal is to endorse at least 100 Black candidates running for state and local office in 2023, as we work to expand Black representation across all levels of government. Specifically, our priority states for statewide and state legislative races are: Kentucky, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Jersey, and Virginia. We will also focus on several mayoral races in key major cities across the country including Chicago, Denver, Houston and Philadelphia. When we have elected officials who reflect and respect the diversity of our communities, we have a government that is more effective and more responsive to the needs of their constituents. We know that the ripple effect of this election as it pertains to the prowess of Black candidates, will be felt for years to come. The Collective in the News Al Dia News - Politico - Times - Essence - Thank you for being a part of The Collective Fam! Be sure to follow us on social media (Twitter/IG: @collectivepac) for the latest updates and join us at an upcoming virtual event. Also, don't hesitate to email us at info@collectivepac.org if you have any questions or need additional information. | | ---|---|--- The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. | | I'm honored to serve my third term in Congress. It is humbling to again hold this sacred responsibility to our nation. I wouldn't be here without the support of this movement or the endorsements of trusted organizations. This cycle, I was proud to be endorsed by many progressive groups, including the Council for a Livable World. **The Council's chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons.** They help elect candidates who support their mission and then support those members once in Congress. The war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too clear. **The Council for a Livable World is circulating a petition to President Biden calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements in the future.** [**Sign the petition and show your support for continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58579079/391556096/-136693048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDZjMWZhMC0xYmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWkDS-k2BCC8znuw3cLysQfgBHrwxPlu9ZackqJLUQU=&emci=b1e47792-8ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f46c1fa0-1baa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) [sign here now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58579080/391556097/-136693048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDZjMWZhMC0xYmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWkDS-k2BCC8znuw3cLysQfgBHrwxPlu9ZackqJLUQU=&emci=b1e47792-8ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f46c1fa0-1baa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) Continuing negotiations with other nuclear-armed states is essential even when it seems difficult. That's why the Council is pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control, and commonsense defense spending in order to create a more livable world. [**Sign the petition and tell President Biden to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58579081/391556098/-136693048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDZjMWZhMC0xYmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWkDS-k2BCC8znuw3cLysQfgBHrwxPlu9ZackqJLUQU=&emci=b1e47792-8ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f46c1fa0-1baa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) Together we can create a more livable world, _Andy_ **P.S.**[**If you like this movement and want to help, please consider joining the Council for a Livable World supporter list or making a financial contribution to their important work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58579082/391556099/-1990905992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDZjMWZhMC0xYmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWkDS-k2BCC8znuw3cLysQfgBHrwxPlu9ZackqJLUQU=&emci=b1e47792-8ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f46c1fa0-1baa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) |

But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.

Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
Will you split a contribution — of $10 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Future Forum PAC so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100] More [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?express_lane=true&refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=other]
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-AREENG-FebruaryIlhan?refcode=E20248-20230211-Ilhan-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]
https://www.facebook.com/FutureForumPAC/ [https://www.facebook.com/FutureForumPAC/] https://twitter.com/futureforumpac [https://twitter.com/futureforumpac]
Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. Will you help protect our progress in Congress by making a contribution today? 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=ad038ef40c4448bdb8cfd20f9b0bbf9c&_e=tGTtIpxDFu9Ks6jFaXF1fcvcnyW1z-MS9MFwgdh8zgfsE8BtELRdNdB8tJWULzCebEIbN2lMLxfkNI1H4BNI6wymd77of3WW_0aaQyHQey-iujESk_M0mYhTygQICEq4C84364DBxuzFAu1B6cWvS2MR4F6D44xXYPpyYdFxM_6RLxrYuGUX5YOKw-7QmN812RF7irYA3Nlo6sXZKXlYJeUDCISE8fHHCsiGmxODMxTviy18tuMa_9Y47DLu3Ryq)

Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.** Want to make a positive impact on the Commonwealth’s future? and provide him with your thoughts. | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Joe Shepherd, United Rural Democrats
subject: I'm headed to our first fundraising event ever, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
People are starting to notice our work — and invest in it. | | | Hi Peter — We have exciting news — I'm en route right now to Los Angeles for our first-ever in-person fundraising event. It's happening because people across the country are noticing our work and noticing that it's making a big difference. We’ll be discussing our victories in 2022 and what's ahead for our organization in 2023 and 2024. **In 2022, URD galvanized support across the country, and our work is getting some much-needed attention. That's good news for rural communities.** We're helping Democratic candidates, local parties, organizers, voters, and volunteers to make sure that every rural American is prioritized in our political process. **We helped dozens of rural Democrats get elected in 2022, but we're not stopping there.** We just launched **_URD Grants_** , a new program to provide grants to local parties to make sure they can expand their Democratic wins in 2023 and 2024. [Investing in counties and small races will win back crucial seats, make changes in peoples' lives, and aid in bigger Democratic wins in 2024. But Republicans are doing _everything they can_ to stop our progress. Mitch McConnell is only two seats away from retaking the majority, and the GOP is _already_ laying the groundwork to ban abortion nationwide, completely block President Biden’s agenda, and steal EVEN MORE Supreme Court seats if they win in 2024!

body:
| Hi Derek, did you see our [**corporate greed survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58582785/391569594/250802856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDE5MmRlOS0yMGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XvV5zt-xTuUVBa0-VTd7mLlXa3O57pDLOA_LfxwQzG0=&emci=83f7496c-85a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c0192de9-20aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)

Chris is in Congress thanks to folks like you, and he’s ready to take on the unchecked corporate greed that hurts working families. But first he wants to hear from you about how mega-corporations and their out-of-control antics are hurting you and your community.

**So please, Derek, let us know:[How is corporate greed impacting your life?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58582786/391569595/250802856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDE5MmRlOS0yMGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XvV5zt-xTuUVBa0-VTd7mLlXa3O57pDLOA_LfxwQzG0=&emci=83f7496c-85a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c0192de9-20aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)**

Thank you,

Team Deluzio

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Deluzio HQ**
Date: Thursday, Jan 26, 2023 at 4:50 PM
Subject: Chris is ready to tackle corporate greed → [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58582787/391569596/1060757799?refcode=em_surv_2023.02.11_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDE5MmRlOS0yMGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XvV5zt-xTuUVBa0-VTd7mLlXa3O57pDLOA_LfxwQzG0=) Team —

Now that Chris is in Congress, one of his first priorities is to take on unchecked corporate greed.

For far too long, Congress has sat back and allowed mega-corporations to gobble up competitors and rake in profits, all while hard-working folks struggle to get by. Whether it’s from a lack of good paying jobs, manufacturing being shipped overseas, or hiked prices, it’s impacting working people every day.

**Chris isn’t owned by mega-corporations or dark money special interests, and he’s ready to bring down costs and bring back jobs. But first, he wants to know: How is corporate greed impacting your life?** | **[LET US KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58582788/391569597/250802856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDE5MmRlOS0yMGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XvV5zt-xTuUVBa0-VTd7mLlXa3O57pDLOA_LfxwQzG0=&emci=83f7496c-85a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c0192de9-20aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)**
---
Thanks,

Team Deluzio

__ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. But first he wants to hear from you about how mega-corporations and their out-of-control antics are hurting you and your community. So please, Derek, let us know: Thank you, Team Deluzio \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Deluzio HQ Date: Thursday, Jan 26, 2023 at 4:50 PM Subject: Chris is ready to tackle corporate greed → = Team — Now that Chris is in Congress, one of his first priorities is to take on unchecked corporate greed. For far too long, Congress has sat back and allowed mega-corporations to gobble up competitors and rake in profits, all while hard-working folks struggle to get by. Whether it’s from a lack of good paying jobs, manufacturing being shipped overseas, or hiked prices, it’s impacting working people every day. Chris isn’t owned by mega-corporations or dark money special interests, and he’s ready to bring down costs and bring back jobs. But first, he wants to know: How is corporate greed impacting your life? | Thanks, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: China Accountability Task Force (House GOP)
subject: Official 2023 China Accountability Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hello,

We hope this email finds you well. House Republicans are conducting a _**[formal survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r "formal
survey")**_ of a small handful of informed individuals on the biggest national security concern of our time:

**Communist China aggression. **

China has been in the news a lot recently for threatening American interests both abroad and right here at home. We launched this survey to get a better understanding on how the American People feel about recent developments - we chose you to represent your community.

This survey is just a few short questions and won't take more than a moment to complete. We promise. These questions are completely voluntary so only answer the questions you want to answer or feel strongly about.

[**We have attached your survey below this short introduction.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r "We have attached
your survey below this short introduction.")

Thank you for providing your input.

**China Accountability Task Force**
_From House Republicans HQ_

---
| **OFFICIAL 2023 CHINA ACCOUNTABILITY SURVEY
Survey active for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")
Deadline to complete: 11:59 PM Tonight**
---
**_Question 1:_ China is buying up hundreds of thousands of acres of U.S. farmland - do you think Congress should BAN these purchases?****[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r) _[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r)**
* * *
**_Question 2:_ A Chinese spy balloon recently floated over the entire continental U.S. before Joe Biden finally took action- do you approve of his decision to wait an entire week?****[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r) _[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r)**
* * *
**_Question 3:_ Many Republicans criticized Biden for taking so long - do you think he should have shot down the Chinese spy balloon right when it crossed into U.S. airspace?****[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r) _[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r)**
* * *
**_Question 4:_ House Republicans formally established a committee specifically about combatting Chinese aggression - do you support this decision? ****[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r) _[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62310670:67zLzDGN3:m:1:3299561967:81EA6A154A008419FB9A1A89FF49CE04:r)**

name: Josh Harder
subject: how does your representative spend their time?
body:
Today I want to talk about something that wasn’t in the national headlines, but was an urgent emergency for my team and our community a few weeks ago. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601214/391610159/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwYTk1NjgtNGVhYS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9H-ee4O9Vralvx62aTJNiNYFzjfMS8vOd-BjVtXCRE0=) | Peter, Today I want to talk about something that wasn’t in the national headlines, but was an urgent emergency for my team and our community a few weeks ago. Over the past month, massive floods overwhelmed parts of my district. Thousands of families evacuated from their homes. Our largest school districts were closed and major roadways were underwater. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601215/391610160/-1676763246?refcode=E20278-20230210-Flooding-graphic-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwYTk1NjgtNGVhYS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9H-ee4O9Vralvx62aTJNiNYFzjfMS8vOd-BjVtXCRE0=) I spoke to a mom whose house flooded five times. She was separated from her kids because they couldn’t find a place big enough to stay together during the flooding. Thousands of families have stories like this. But the story doesn’t end there. After I toured the damage I learned something shocking - my community in San Joaquin County had not been included in FEMA assistance! My team and I were livid. We jumped into action, got on the phones and within 24 hours we convinced FEMA to add San Joaquin County to their assistance list. I share this story because this is what every single representative should be doing: rolling up their sleeves, listening to what’s needed and then fighting for their districts. Unfortunately there are now multiple extremists who believe removing Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee or investigating conspiracy theories is their job description. And it’s a real shame. I hope you take some time to investigate what your representative is spending their time on. It will illustrate what, and who, they are prioritizing. And to those who are still recovering from these floods, please do visit FEMA’s [website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601216/391610161/2057255574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwYTk1NjgtNGVhYS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9H-ee4O9Vralvx62aTJNiNYFzjfMS8vOd-BjVtXCRE0=&emci=c1d91158-4eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a50a9568-4eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) to learn more about assistance to help you rebuild. \- Josh [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601217/391610162/-1676763246?refcode=E20278-20230210-Flooding-SB-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwYTk1NjgtNGVhYS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9H-ee4O9Vralvx62aTJNiNYFzjfMS8vOd-BjVtXCRE0=)

Peter,

The 118th Congress officially convened in January, and our Senate Republican caucus is hard at work to rein in Joe Biden and the Democrats to get America back on track.

As you know, we have a real fight on our hands.

The left is bound and determined to “transform” our country into a place we no longer recognize. My conservative colleagues and I are fired up to lead the charge to _derail their disastrous agenda_ , _stand up for We the People_ , and _Make America Great Again_!

Today, I want to get your opinion on what our #1 priority should be.
**Which issue matters most to YOU as we get to work in the Senate?**
---

\- Coach Tuberville

Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t responded to my February Priorities Survey, **and I’m planning to follow up with the results of this survey in the next couple of days.**
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work in the months ahead, the initial response was overwhelming. **That’s why we’ve decided to re-open this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
Peter, I vow to do whatever it takes to fight for the safety and security of you and your loved ones, but I can only do this if I know where your priorities lie.
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my February Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-priorities-0223](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58584623/391576286/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk956-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTZmZDNkNC0yNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UG_fbYGiVAJoN6Effkt2jk6W5Ol5-r5LNUu5Tyzq0EQ=&emci=b17159f5-c3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a56fd3d4-25aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for your help here.

Letitia James

| | |
---

---

EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58584625/391576287/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk956-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTZmZDNkNC0yNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UG_fbYGiVAJoN6Effkt2jk6W5Ol5-r5LNUu5Tyzq0EQ=&emci=b17159f5-c3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a56fd3d4-25aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. I received my full education, kindergarten through college, from the New York City public school system. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**You might be wondering why I’m telling you this, and the answer is simple: I know what it is like to feel voiceless.**
That’s why, when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way – and that’s why I created my priorities survey.

**[Peter, I’m proud to put the people’s priorities first, but to do that effectively, I need to know what your concerns are. So please, will you take my February Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58584628/391576288/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk956-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTZmZDNkNC0yNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UG_fbYGiVAJoN6Effkt2jk6W5Ol5-r5LNUu5Tyzq0EQ=&emci=b17159f5-c3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a56fd3d4-25aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58584630/391576293/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk956-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTZmZDNkNC0yNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UG_fbYGiVAJoN6Effkt2jk6W5Ol5-r5LNUu5Tyzq0EQ=&emci=b17159f5-c3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a56fd3d4-25aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
I know that Democrats were able to win big in the 2022 elections – but our work is nowhere near complete. This year, we are still fighting for abortion to be safe and accessible to all, we are still fighting against voter suppression laws that are eerily similar to those seen during the Jim Crow era, and we are still losing too many loved ones to gun violence.

Peter, I vow to never stop fighting until all people who live in America are protected, but I need your help. With the political landscape drastically different today than it was four months ago, I need to know which fights to prioritize this year – and that’s where you come in.

**I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but it looks like I’m still missing your response, Peter. So please:[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58584632/391576301/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk956-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTZmZDNkNC0yNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UG_fbYGiVAJoN6Effkt2jk6W5Ol5-r5LNUu5Tyzq0EQ=&emci=b17159f5-c3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a56fd3d4-25aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work in the months ahead, the initial response was overwhelming. That’s why we’ve decided to re-open this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. Peter, I vow to do whatever it takes to fight for the safety and security of you and your loved ones, but I can only do this if I know where your priorities lie. So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my February Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form: Thank you for your help here. Letitia James \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Fri, Feb 10, 2023 Subject: What are your priorities, Peter? | | | | | FEBRUARY 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY NAME: Peter EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: INCOMPLETE Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard | | Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege. I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. I received my full education, kindergarten through college, from the New York City public school system. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family. You might be wondering why I’m telling you this, and the answer is simple: I know what it is like to feel voiceless. That’s why, when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way – and that’s why I created my priorities survey. | | I know that Democrats were able to win big in the 2022 elections – but our work is nowhere near complete. This year, we are still fighting for abortion to be safe and accessible to all, we are still fighting against voter suppression laws that are eerily similar to those seen during the Jim Crow era, and we are still losing too many loved ones to gun violence. Peter, I vow to never stop fighting until all people who live in America are protected, but I need your help. With the political landscape drastically different today than it was four months ago, I need to know which fights to prioritize this year – and that’s where you come in. I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but it looks like I’m still missing your response, Peter. So please: | | Thank you for making your voice heard. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: February 2023 e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 February e-newsletter
News and information for the District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Time to heal following mass shooting in Half Moon Bay**
---
| Dear friends, First of all, the outpouring of support and love within Half Moon Bay and from all over the world has been immense following the most tragic mass shooting in San Mateo County’s history two weeks ago. I understand there is a lot of grief in our community and that this is the time to heal. As we mourn together the loss of these 7 farmworkers in Half Moon Bay, the County is providing mental health counselors and other support to the community. Our Crisis Response Team (CRT) from Behavioral Health and Recovery Services has been meeting with families in the reunification center and other locations in Half Moon Bay. CRT staff are trained in crisis response, suicide prevention, and other mental health interventions. They provide individual and group psychological first aid, grief support counseling, connection to needed ongoing services and crisis intervention counseling free of charge to residents in need.
---
The county is also working with the City of Half Moon Bay and local agencies to provide temporary housing, meals and other services to those directly impacted by the shootings. Keep in mind there are dozens of farmworkers out of work now because of this crisis and we are doing all we can to support them and I assure you the county is prepared to do all it can to help our community heal. The victims are identified as Zhishen Liu, 73, of San Francisco; Marciano Martinez Jimenez, 50, of Moss Beach; Qizhong Cheng, 66, of Half Moon Bay; Aixiang Zhang, 74, of San Francisco; Jingzhi Lu, 64, of Half Moon Bay; and Yetao Bing, 43 years and Jose Romero Perez. We honored the victims at our recent Board of Supervisors with a moment of silence and have made a pledge to improve the housing conditions for all farmworkers on the coast. Special thanks to Alas, the nonprofit on the coast, that has assisted farmworkers impacted by the crisis and for bringing the community together at several vigils over the past two weeks.
---
|
# **County proclaims January as Lunar New Year Month**
I was honored to present the county’s first-of-its-kind proclamation declaring January 2023 as Lunar New Year Month to Sophia Tseng, Board President, and Yung-Hui Chien, former Board President and long-time volunteer, of the North Peninsula Mandarin School in the city of San Mateo. Before I presented the proclamation, I acknowledged the tragedies that have impacted the Asian American community, our county and California as a state. From Monterey Park to our own community in Half Moon Bay, this Lunar New Year has been marked by significant pain and grief. Although it’s been a somber start to the New Year, we cannot let these tragedies mar that this is a time for renewal. Lunar New Year is a celebration of the arrival of spring and the beginning of a new year. Having started on January 22, our Asian American and Asian Pacific Islander communities are observing the Year of the Rabbit, considered to represent calm, positivity, and contemplation. As our communities observe this new year, may it bring healing and light to you and your families during this time.
---
---
| **[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a07a87bca8&e=c0babbc643)**
# **Please join me for Coffee with Canepa**

Please join me and some special guest speakers for our Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa monthly events on Saturday, February 18 at Philz Coffee in Westborough Square in South San Francisco from 10 a.m. to noon.

This month’s topic is about mental health, a timely issue considering the mass shooting in Half Moon Bay and for those residents who were severely impacted by the devastating storms that caused significant damage from flooding, mudslides, power outages and downed trees.

We will hear about the resources the county provides related to mental health, including behavioral health counseling and learn about nonprofit advocates that help to improve mental health services throughout our county, reduce the stigma associated with mental illness and support effective treatment and recovery programs.

[RSVP NOW!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=def6496521&e=c0babbc643)
---
---
|
---
| **Recovering from the January storms**
---
| The heavy rains at the beginning of the year prompted San Mateo County to declare a State of Emergency Jan. 4 which qualifies the county to access FEMA funds for our recovery efforts. Now county residents impacted by the storms can also apply to FEMA for damages caused to their properties.

Starting Thursday Feb. 9, the county will standup a Disaster Recovery Center in San Mateo to help residents affected by recent storms learn about available assistance from local, state and federal agencies.

The center will operate daily from Feb. 9 through Wednesday, Feb. 22 (the center could close earlier if all residents have been served), at the San Mateo County Event Center, west parking entrance, 2495 South Delaware St., San Mateo, 94403 (Google map link)

Hours are 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. – including the weekend – in Cypress Hall.

Representatives from the county, state Office of Emergency Services and Federal Emergency Management Agency will provide a one-stop source for information with services that include employment assistance, record replacement, veterans’ assistance, referrals to agencies that may offer other assistance and information on Small Business Administration programs
---
If you sustained damages or losses due to the New Year’s storms, you can apply now for FEMA disaster assistance.

Disaster assistance may include grants to help pay for temporary housing and essential home repairs as well as other serious disaster-related needs such as medical and dental expenses, transportation, childcare and moving and storage expenses. The deadline to apply is March 16, 2023.

If you have insurance, first file a claim with your insurance provider. FEMA provides assistance to applicants for your uninsured or underinsured disaster-caused expenses and serious needs.

To apply visit [DisasterAssistance.gov](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6a6692a65c&e=c0babbc643) or call all the FEMA Helpline at 800-621-3362. Help is available in many languages.

Assistance from FEMA became available when San Mateo County was added to the “major disaster declaration” for the series of storms that pummeled the state beginning at the end of December 2022. Please share this information with anyone you think may qualify for the assistance.
---
|
---
|
# **Caltrain electrification now fully funded**
---
| As a member of the Metropolitan Transportation Commission and SamTrans Board of Directors, I’m pleased to announce Caltrain will receive $367 million in state funding to finish its electrification project.

This will be the most transformative public transportation project the San Francisco Peninsula will see in our lifetimes. This will take cars off the roads with increased service, reduce our carbon footprint and connect San Francisco and Silicon Valley to the rest of the Bay Area with virtually a seamless transportation network. Electrification will also pave the way for the future of high-speed rail which one day will connect most of California. It’s an exciting day. Go Caltrain. Choo choo!
---
Caltrain Electrification will electrify the corridor from San Francisco Caltrain Station to the Tamien Caltrain Station. Electrification improvements include converting diesel-hauled trains to electric trains, increasing service to six trains per peak hour per direction, and maintaining operating speed up to 79 mph.

The primary purpose of Caltrain Electrification is to improve Caltrain system performance and curtail long-term environmental impacts by reducing noise, improving regional air quality, and lowering greenhouse gas emissions.

Read the release from Caltrain here: [https://www.caltrain.com/news/caltrain-receives-367-million-state-funding-finish-electrification-project](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=82bfc4bc0a&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
|
# **MTC funds several local pedestrian and bicycle improvement projects**
---
| The Metropolitan Transportation Commission Board of Directors also approved a $300 million One Bay Area Grant Program last month, including a $34 million investment in San Mateo County to support several pedestrian and bicycle improvements from Colma, South San Francisco, Burlingame, Redwood City and Menlo Park.

Protecting children who walk or ride their bikes to schools or older persons trying to cross our busy traffic corridors just got a big boost. Some of these projects have been in the planning stages for years, including the El Camino Real Bicycle and Pedestrian Improvement Plan which kicked off in Colma back in 2019.

This shows a continued commitment by the MTC to use our federal dollars to improve safety for residents throughout the entire Bay Area. I proud to serve on the MTC to bring these much need federal and state dollars to the Peninsula.

---
The San Mateo County projects include:

Rollins Road Bicycle and Pedestrian Improvement in Burlingame for $3,100,000; and

El Camino Real Complete Street, Mission Road to SSF and Colma for $4,640,000
With an additional grant from C/CAG for $2,120,000; and

Middle Ave. Caltrain Pedestrian and Bicycle Undercrossing in Menlo Park for $5,000,000; and

Roosevelt Avenue Traffic Calming Project in Redwood City for $3,400,000; and

Bay Road Complete Street Rehabilitation in San Mateo County for $3,807,000; and

19th Ave/Fashion Island Blvd Complete Street Class IV SMC Transit Authority for $3,375,000; and

School St/Spruce Ave and Hillside Blvd Safety and Access Imps in South San Francisco for $3,128,000.
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0d1a1d7e9b&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=56781a7462&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=f277ad5fe6&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. Click the icons below and like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.** ** In friendship, David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=504cfc2ccb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=504cfc2ccb).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)

name: Becca Balint
subject: Expel George Santos from Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Become a citizen co-sponsor of my resolution to expel George Santos from Congress | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58585112/391578157/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY4MmJlNi0yNmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a2a0wYi4E9YG7tejNGYPNU5pgrF7u5Y7RmXEe1BNhU8=&emci=998e7226-7ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=44f82be6-26aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I just joined my colleagues in filing legislation to expel George Santos from Congress. clean_body: Become a citizen co-sponsor of my resolution to expel George Santos from Congress | | Peter, I just joined my colleagues in filing legislation to expel George Santos from Congress. During his campaign to win a key congressional seat in New York, he fabricated his education experience, his job history, his finances, and his background as the descendant of Holocaust survivors. As someone whose grandfather was murdered in the Holocaust, George Santos’ lies are particularly egregious, outrageous, and unacceptable. George Santos defrauded voters, broke the public’s trust, and cheated his way into a swing seat. Now, I’ve introduced a resolution to expel him from Congress. As a Member of the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, it is my sworn duty to uphold the integrity of our institutions and ensure that those who intentionally do wrong to the American people are held accountable for their actions. George Santos is guilty of committing a tremendous fraud against his constituents, and Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike are now calling for his immediate resignation. It’s time for us to bring the issue of his expulsion to the House floor for a vote. Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . body:

| | Peter, Letting a Chinese surveillance balloon drift over America is like seeing a robber on your front porch and inviting him in, showing him where you keep your safe, where you keep your guns, where your children sleep at night, and then politely asking him to leave. **It makes no sense. ** The China spy balloon makes us look weak and flat-footed on the world stage.

clean_body: It’s time to push back before it’s too late, before something far more dangerous than a balloon is flying above American territory. | | | | | Peter, Letting a Chinese surveillance balloon drift over America is like seeing a robber on your front porch and inviting him in, showing him where you keep your safe, where you keep your guns, where your children sleep at night, and then politely asking him to leave. It makes no sense. The China spy balloon makes us look weak and flat-footed on the world stage. | | | | The message for the Biden Administration is this: Take the CCP seriously. Take their threats at face value and stop giving them the benefit of the doubt. They’re our adversaries, not our friends. It’s time to push back before it’s too late, before something far more dangerous than a balloon is flying above American territory. -Team Gallagher | | | No one has fought harder to make America safer and more secure than Mike Gallagher. He’s taking on the CCP so American principles lead the way in the 21st century. We’re grateful you’ve subscribed to receive our email updates. Mind you, the debt is now 120% of the GDP (larger than the entire dadgum economy). friend, we cannot continue to kick the can down the road while Congress piles on more debt, leading to even more outrageous inflation. We are on track to run out of money in June if we can’t strike a deal to fix this mess. Of course, this is all part of the liberal elite’s plan to infiltrate our republic with socialism. This isn’t just about the debt ceiling. It’s about spending trillions of dollars to put more people on the government dole. It’s about our children and grandchildren. name: Bob Casey
subject: Black History Month and our shared future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I'm inspired by the people who take part in these movements, including many of you. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58585711/391580509/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTliOTFiYS0yOWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uDpVcWtsoUk7AgdmDYsDaP_FbXYu_Vsd5QpMlZd590I=&emci=890bda90-9fa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f59b91ba-29aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Each February, I am reminded of a quotation from Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. "We are not makers of history; we are made by history."

In just the past few years, our history led to dramatic changes. During the first year of the COVID-19 pandemic, as many as 26 million Americans participated in Black Lives Matter protests, building the largest protest movement in history. Voters turned out in record numbers to elect the first Black, South Asian vice president of our Nation. And Black voters and Black leaders played a pivotal role in flipping the Senate majority.

In response, far too many politicians have tried to erase history. They attempted to ban an accurate teaching of racism that shaped our history. They've called for censorship because they understand that the natural progression of history will lead us to a future where their regressive views become obsolete.

That's why, this Black History Month, it's crucial that we remember that history. We must take inspiration from those who persevered and found success. And we must consider the choices made by those who stood in our way.

History has brought us to a point where we must now decide whether we will defend the civil rights of every American -- rights that Americans like John Lewis and Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. shed blood for -- or whether we will allow our democracy to crumble.

In just the past few weeks, more of my colleagues have responded to the tragic deaths of Black and brown men at the hands of police by joining me in calling for new reforms, including limits on qualified immunity. I'm proud to do my part to fight for voting rights and a more equitable future for all as well, and we will continue to build momentum.

However, I also know these fights may not be won on the floor of the Senate. Elected officials, community leaders, and activists are fighting for justice in state legislatures, in school board meetings, and on the streets.

I'm inspired by the people who take part in these movements, including many of you. You carry the torch forward from the leaders of the past. I look forward to continuing to listen and fight alongside you as we build support for voting rights and transformational legislation that will allow children, families, workers, and seniors to thrive.

Together, we will win, as history marches forward.

Sincerely,

Bob
