name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: These emails fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
If we're going to re-elect Cori, we can't slow down.
#
Hey, Peter — can I be honest with you?
I know that emails like this one might add up in your inbox, I see it in mine too! I understand that the stream of emails asking for a donation can seem endless, so I wanted to make sure you knew that a real person wrote this email.
**As Cori's Campaign Manager, I'm reaching out today because the truth is, emails like this one fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori.**
Last month, we didn't hit our fundraising goal. And now, we're having to work extra hard to make up that gap. _That's where you come in, Peter._
Our opponents are already raising millions from corporate PACs and lobbyists to defeat our movement in 2024, so we can't afford to start this year off financially behind. **But according to our records, it looks like you have yet to chip in to power our campaign to re-elect Cori.**
We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before. But with so much at stake in these next two years, we're hoping we can count on your support today.
[**Will you consider making your first donation today donation to help re-elect Cori today? A donation now will help us get this year back on track to ensure we can put all our energy into fighting for the people.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230211.oSM-0-&refcode=em20230211-2157&t=3&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF)
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230211.oSM-0-&refcode=em20230211-2157&t=4&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF)**
To many, 2023 is an 'off-year'. But Cori has made it abundantly clear that for us — working people and families — we can't afford to take an off-year.
Not while corporate PACs and lobbyists are already fundraising to take us down next year.
Not while reproductive freedom, Medicare for All, and housing justice are on the line.
And not while right-wing extremists have their eyes on our campaign to see if we have what it takes to re-elect Missouri's first Black Congresswoman.
**[Peter, if we're going to re-elect Cori, we can't slow down. Please make your your first donation today to support Cori as she presses forward on our progressive agenda for racial, economic, and environmental justice.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230211.oSM-0-&refcode=em20230211-2157&t=5&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF)**
Thank you,
Adrastos
Campaign Manager, Team Cori
_*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email address, you may not see it here — but know that Cori and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230211?refcode=em20230211-2157-footer&t=6&refcode2=2157_1082990_j3ezhF&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=7&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2157%2E1082990%2Ej3ezhF)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We can have another Democratic House seat if we help Jennifer McClellan win her special election in Virginia in 10 days. She’s doing her job and reaching out to voters. We can help her campaign pay for ads, signs, and mailings, so they can remind voters about this off-season, special election.
body:
Adid a Democratic House seat?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91f9631d-ffd6-4d74-bcef-c51e2a384ffb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you gotten a chance to join us for this one? You probably have a lot going on (we get it!) and we know it can be hard to keep track of it all if we don’t catch you at just the right time. And this off-season race is important, because ... [**We Have Less than Two Weeks To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87374df5-7402-4d50-b1b8-072cc0246854/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In 10 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8907f998-3ab5-48c4-b302-9da1b5f6ff87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ **_We must ensure that in 10 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff28d546-505a-4367-8ad7-8c6c409e2d49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5efc872-d888-4f05-b16c-ecd254d266b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

You probably have a lot going on (we get it!) and we know it can be hard to keep track of it all if we don’t catch you at just the right time. And this off-season race is important, because ... In 10 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries! She describes herself like this: \--- I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act. But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve. My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive. \--- | | | | | | | | McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a nd he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress. We must ensure that in 10 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol. Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: I mean it when I say I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of this country.

body:
Folks, let's look at the results. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’re fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. | |
---
On Tuesday, when I stood in front of Congress and the American people, I said that we were readying the next chapter in the great American story -- a story of progress and resilience. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’ve fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. We've helped create 12 million new jobs. Because of you all, because of the American people. Folks, let's look at the results. The unemployment rate is at a 50-year low. We've funded thousands of projects that are going to put thousands of people to work rebuilding our highways and bridges all across America. We capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. We’ve made a lot of progress together. But we're not finished yet by any stretch of the imagination. **And we need to elect more Democrats to get more done. Now it’s time to _finish the job_ , Derek.** **Will you chip in $7 to the Democratic National Committee? That money goes straight to electing Democrats in all parts of this great nation -- Democrats who will deliver for the American people and rebuild our country.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call: Pramila Jayapal on executive actions & other great guests!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: Executive Actions with Rep. Pramila Jayapal | Jane Kleeb: Inside
the Party | Building Local Power: St. Louis | Progressive School Boards:
San Francisco | Raise the Wage: Valentine’s Day Events | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4001%2E5885482%2EjaWtym ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4001%2E5885482%2EjaWtym ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with US Rep. Pramila
Jayapal kicking off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday!

As Chair of the Progressive Caucus, Rep. Jayapal will join us for a
conversation about how Biden can use executive action to deliver on
progressive priorities under a divided Congress.

OR Board Chair and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb will report back from
the DNC where our growing progressive bloc is fighting to ban dark money
from primaries.

Then, we’ll turn to building local power with Alisha Sonnier, candidate in
the upcoming aldermen election in St. Louis, where we have to win a
progressive majority!

And, we’ll get the latest from newly-elected San Francisco Board of Ed
Commissioner Alida Fisher and Jess Nguyen of the San Francisco Education
Alliance.

| | The radical Left is indoctrinating our children.

Instead of English, science, and arithmetic, they want to teach our kids revisionist history that paints America as bad to breed a generation of America-hating socialists.
**We won't stand for it.**
Our children should be taught to LOVE America and its values, not hate the freest country on Earth.
We’re taking a stand against woke indoctrination in our schools, and we need YOUR help.
[**Join us today to keep the radical Left OUT of our children’s schools!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a434a60e1d22463b99be18b3990704ab&_e=zgdq20VgJnA3ICZo43gzuCp0Fa1Q9kx5nPxhO0cMPpAfTf8P0RtKjF3w7WJvKsDFboq3I3w97Hvq4gLqtUCoXgOWopi6hL904cHKpMx9a2L0zwU9XUgWD-V9XVfrMurQqnj627VXaxglyVUFN8FW8Ue4MqhxIXx6EWZrZIVQ0XpRMdtJPfX10vz7_3AXPQaZEbVUT9yi-773TQiTmEPZExb49zF95BOccNmPwoqiXY2FUCD3Eogng1MgSDcyU16ajSNwdL3rDN3SHplvRX-CIBrcI6pjJkALpTCJgHbTFvCDh7Wc33DSWvMa0AMTlSR72rU9_o-fyLKrJH0eQcwPx4idB_-pG4BzZEy3XHh85bo%3D)

name: Team Crow
subject: McCarthy’s priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks, We’re only a month into Kevin McCarthy’s term as Speaker of the House, and he’s already shown where his priorities lie. He rewarded Lauren Boebert with a position on the House Oversight committee, where she’s pledged to launch partisan investigations against President Biden and his administration. He named George Santos to two committees, even after a majority of his constituents wanted him to resign for his lies. He went so far as to say his mother's life was claimed by 9/11. The Justice Department has been weaponized against Donald J. Trump and his supporters.

* And now we also know that they were colluding with Russia... All while they falsely accused TRUMP of doing the same thing!

It's become America First vs the Deep State, Peter.
With the FBI CORRUPTED by domestic politics and COMPROMISED by foreign cash, patriots like YOU have now fallen into the crosshairs!

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Quick note about the Council for a Livable World.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| |
---
Peter, I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 election cycle. Their endorsement was important to our success, so I want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission and work. The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. In pursuit of that goal, they help elect candidates who support their mission and then support those members once in Congress. This includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control and common-sense defense spending in order to create a more livable world. The war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too real. President Biden is calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements with other nuclear-armed states. [**Would you add your name to the petition to show your support for continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2s1x-Qbll3RG3crSTUjosK0g3JJMDfjJZMq1kpT11ZyCd-GTiKPH8InhnSAPsl34t5XW_9QYbvI3Rrqkaz-LUls3j8AgvedM7xBwnJHKpSofvszRfcBmY4rblfHAanwDtiM4_VZcXqsm9DjnW1vC_OHr_Cbh8uP46BPPK2Ce-sPCLIRzfAuW_cl74T5zqIs10t0iY8Qe606hPy0cLWEatHRNk868RvuUHrZ6pRReaPKxWl3kaJHgO_cXUaXpSvEOmfiNNOxrAFKdrPfOKSII9bKmcOru1kc0Vum0xtMLfBROkGSH5795uUL-IebvGjgxzU/3tm/5980yLlfTtamNTwHDSD98Q/h0/nJhlkwXQZp-qU0IsWfDXisNggrJa5UaNCF2NDtPCCjQ)

The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle. They will support newly elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals. The Council’s goals are admirable, and it’s my hope to continue supporting their work in Congress. I hope you’ll join me. **[Add your name to this petition showing your support for the Council for a Livable World’s continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2s1x-Qbll3RG3crSTUjosK0g3JJMDfjJZMq1kpT11ZyCf8KasH9vQ2UiSIpbjgF_9KzpWnRfDoxsMOuSGz_8UVh5Cue6yGjo51UW5parXqErjEh8JERN_A45oSsUyTVPnIpmK3F__fcd-0nVuMAdC6CNXo9_tZHIwMpMgB-hoCDSlEUbtkkfGnm98l4Pt9exRL-PiPt2u2QgD3J1kkHLqGqttABNBQzWpAHZwQQtXrqlDw3o0EdEwUAQdan5aQK1b19FJLZ0tP5EG7Ea7KCZtyTJKvBwGFaKQ_fcNEHwx2F4KWXckcmWM9eIzTLJF2p9pI/3tm/5980yLlfTtamNTwHDSD98Q/h2/WMdg9cYMoMu0Kt6jYPM4YnX1xUvkhyX_xI3kuZjOPao)** Thanks, Eric

clean_body: | | Peter, I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 election cycle. Their endorsement was important to our success, so I want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission and work. The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. In pursuit of that goal, they help elect candidates who support their mission and then support those members once in Congress. This includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control and common-sense defense spending in order to create a more livable world. The war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too real. President Biden is calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements with other nuclear-armed states. The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle. They will support newly elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals. The Council’s goals are admirable, and it’s my hope to continue supporting their work in Congress. I hope you’ll join me. Thanks, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries... and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312202:6-ipBDGHN:m:1:3331421248:25DB48899DBABBB51C51495254589D32:r)
|

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312202:6-ipBDGHN:m:1:3331421248:25DB48899DBABBB51C51495254589D32:r) Dear Peter,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312202:6-ipBDGHN:m:1:3331421248:25DB48899DBABBB51C51495254589D32:r)

His name is John D. Andries... and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives... that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults... Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities... but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312202:6-ipBDGHN:m:1:3331421248:25DB48899DBABBB51C51495254589D32:r)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Peter, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312202:6-ipBDGHN:m:1:3331421248:25DB48899DBABBB51C51495254589D32:r)

body:
This decision is a huge victory for our children and equality.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58591530/391597136/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230211SFU_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZGNkNjg3LTM4YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A8qjRESe7Vf0RJ__6hQUH3Ee_AuXeTMJH4Nd3gsA5T4=)
| Fellow activist, did you see this? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58591532/391597137/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230211SFU_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_A_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZGNkNjg3LTM4YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A8qjRESe7Vf0RJ__6hQUH3Ee_AuXeTMJH4Nd3gsA5T4=) After **years** of advocacy and hard work, a Commonwealth Court judge ruled in favor of a school funding lawsuit and declared our discriminatory school funding system unconstitutional.

Pennsylvania has long neglected to provide adequate and equitable funding for public schools in areas with low property values, leaving students and teachers without the resources they need to succeed.

Here at the New Pennsylvania Project, we celebrate this landmark decision and its potential to end decades of funding discrimination, particularly against the historically disenfranchised and neglected communities we center.

**But the fight for fair and equitable school funding is not over yet, fellow activist. The court left fixing this to the Pennsylvania State Legislature.****[Can you pitch in $10 today to help us expand the electorate and elect leaders who will stand up for fair education funding?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58591533/391597139/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230211SFU_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZGNkNjg3LTM4YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A8qjRESe7Vf0RJ__6hQUH3Ee_AuXeTMJH4Nd3gsA5T4=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58591534/391597141/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230211SFU_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZGNkNjg3LTM4YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A8qjRESe7Vf0RJ__6hQUH3Ee_AuXeTMJH4Nd3gsA5T4=) This decision is certainly a huge victory worth celebrating. But we must not simply sit around. Even with the Democrats confirming their majority in Pennsylvania’s state House, progress may still be subject to the whims of the Republican-controlled state Senate.

Whether they respond by blatantly ignoring the court order or through simply taking the smallest steps possible, true progress will likely take flipping the state Senate, once again bringing us back to the ballot box.

As with so many other issues, the key to a better Commonwealth lies in expanding the electorate to include Black, Indigenous, immigrants, other people of color and the youth to achieve a more reflective democracy. **[We have already made monumental progress. Will you donate $10 right now to help us keep up the year-round voter engagement it’s going to take to expand the electorate and flip the state Senate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58591535/391597142/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230211SFU_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZGNkNjg3LTM4YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A8qjRESe7Vf0RJ__6hQUH3Ee_AuXeTMJH4Nd3gsA5T4=)** clean_body: This decision is a huge victory for our children and equality. = | Fellow activist, did you see this? = After years of advocacy and hard work, a Commonwealth Court judge ruled in favor of a school funding lawsuit and declared our discriminatory school funding system unconstitutional. Pennsylvania has long neglected to provide adequate and equitable funding for public schools in areas with low property values, leaving students and teachers without the resources they need to succeed. Here at the New Pennsylvania Project, we celebrate this landmark decision and its potential to end decades of funding discrimination, particularly against the historically disenfranchised and neglected communities we center. But the fight for fair and equitable school funding is not over yet, fellow activist. The court left fixing this to the Pennsylvania State Legislature.= = This decision is certainly a huge victory worth celebrating. But we must not simply sit around. Even with the Democrats confirming their majority in Pennsylvania’s state House, progress may still be subject to the whims of the Republican-controlled state Senate. Whether they respond by blatantly ignoring the court order or through simply taking the smallest steps possible, true progress will likely take flipping the state Senate, once again bringing us back to the ballot box. As with so many other issues, the key to a better Commonwealth lies in expanding the electorate to include Black, Indigenous, immigrants, other people of color and the youth to achieve a more reflective democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. With our special election falling just months after a national election, _we need to make sure Virginians are energized and ready to vote!_

**But it takes a lot of work to mobilize for an election like ours — knocking on doors, digital and radio ads, volunteer supplies, and even writing emails like this one.**

Peter –

Even for House Republicans, this is low. Late last month, they voted to take away one of the key tools we use to react to spiking gas prices – functionally ensuring higher gas prices for all of us.

If this is what Republicans do with their first month in the House majority, imagine what they’ll do for the next two years. clean_body: If this is what Republicans do with their first month in the House majority, imagine what they’ll do for the next two years. | = | | | House GOP votes to INCREASE prices at the gas pump | = Peter – Even for House Republicans, this is low. Late last month, they voted to take away one of the key tools we use to react to spiking gas prices – functionally ensuring higher gas prices for all of us. If this is what Republicans do with their first month in the House majority, imagine what they’ll do for the next two years. We absolutely must take back the Democratic majority in the next election and get to work lowering costs across the board for American families and workers. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Team Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From warning of the imminent national security threat posed by the CCP to discussing Biden's State of the Union Address, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week.
---
**In the News**
---
**WALTZ ON CHINESE SPY BALLOON** Monday morning, Mike kicked off the week by joining Fox New's [America's Newsroom](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7JvapWU8r9wZplBl-NguLMDR6YaW0ZZz-Xwir34M_0apfgaBjxGBuDtONnYcAkYd2O2Y9w7Seh1f-cnFJSfKRWY6RPU3ZNmu-kJl0mXqBVZS8nii7VmnEr_Odb-JKGsj-o7ZpKECY_1AtEhOX_X20x8N_Pc9DdoasapSxG16GCYDrbKngof8C6joeBq_I6wXohrCAHehGXgAKgtDhoSI8trLYzVluyBO6bVdVeOvcdFFGpUg5bWwr-Hq0TqoaNTnlDwBe9-gY8KqSyH5ynClVPm0h9GO8Rrb8fqSmAvkkpu) to discuss the Chinese spy balloon and the vital threat posed by the CCP. _"WE ARE IN A COLD WAR WITH THE CCP- The difference though and why this one is so much more dangerous than the one with the soviet union is we are so economically dependent and they have created so many supply chain dependencies. I hope this is a wake up call for the country." _
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7JvapWU8r9wZplBl-NguLMDR6YaW0ZZz-Xwir34M_0apfgaBjxGBuDtONnYcAkYd2O2Y9w7Seh1f-cnFJSfKRWY6RPU3ZNmu-kJl0mXqBVZS8nii7VmnEr_Odb-JKGsj-o7ZpKECY_1AtEhOX_X20wnQl9smCIm3rUurOu2YqtS7Yr32tQG2li-43KzBN6L3aUGmHmi0HTY6WaxPjnpkD3dmpWP5tm1uLTY4C4jN6ic-bd8wCYxBWCQoRgRBN9xO9UR9uZNibRRg-mBsZ9uiqp7FtSoAdfURs_15vT8MFhG)
---
Watch the entire clip [here](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7JvapWU8r9wZplBl-NguLMDR6YaW0ZZz-Xwir34M_0apfgaBjxGBuDtONnYcAkYd2O2Y9w7Seh1f-cnFJSfKRWY6RPU3ZNmu-kJl0mXqBVZS8nii7VmnEr_Odb-JKGsj-o7ZpKECY_1AtEhOX_X20xzFTR9MFwupZb5MLV95md61Yx_-PP7oaSwAsFoqi_WFA_AMDNR9ZwWPGxMP5LcbDZDJ-KTL5ifDJPJG6kooqCC0By4xB2KYJpuOD3DvKGCk_rdI5YuaFWvgV9cb4EuxVQ64mbT_-I0lNlFAHiRSqVZ).
---
**WALTZ ON WHITE HOUSE DEFLECTION** On Tuesday, Mike joined CNN's [The Lead](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7sqRM30r3ghMveLO8F08qR62FfFuziab2JNOoBcbITCXtJIh6gZOW_yE3G5Vr2ZIWwpcdFIqqeLn53IU59dvrq7DKstwi9jXFc392iPQjFrZ4_1rWYDmfiAj57pVTSz2Z1-D572GH7JN7hBNbHX0wJfGQYaA19YDxzdQeyVrUuM1UbetMWWNNLpuK32LyUPvE4-B04xxayrmAZoCAGfK-gwWAoWq-nRBbjImtGHPXdPWSd2UDI4jaomfDXoXZwc6qrFxtXg6Uqw9AxQZSY7zjCl7xe2TWnNOV7peeer2dl5xhIqBHu9zWUm4r8juDBGZg%3D%3D) to discuss rising tensions resulting from the CCP balloon, China's rising power, and the White House's refusal to address the issue head-on. _"We've heard more spin from the White House about this and other potential balloons that have entered our airspace than facts. There are a lot of questions left unanswered that I am determined to get to the bottom of." _
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7sqRM30r3ghMveLO8F08qR62FfFuziab2JNOoBcbITCXtJIh6gZOW_yE3G5Vr2ZIWwpcdFIqqeLn53IU59dvrq7DKstwi9jXFc392iPQjFrZ4_1rWYDmfiAj57pVTSz2Z1-D572GH7JN7hBNbHX0wJfGQYaA19YDxzdQeyVrUuMRubzZP58uWZzlDS0rWCwV4cRQKbs-ragQILw1w6LlFuHEo_lmGcO7DNMihMskE7B9xk6vPU28nFy32oAkWv1kshV8ClxQstmXnAIA4zw1JjfPz-YcvdGhhcl5btrDTdXGR1DVU45430VTGsAamaFkg%3D%3D)

---
**WALTZ ON CONDEMNING CHINA** Thursday evening, Mike joined Fox Business' [The Bottom Line](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWbxtXcfSM92aRWyK7NNKloE9jCghEE3u_mU-V7IXkz7JUtcpkybwt3ZYG9ArtPm_RjXX2hRVPYFBtN3zpK9B8LTaoRh90nZAjCB_SnM2p1ytwTxzgdGzTsqVwYFjL7FTtbJ9L_JIsLMwfUTcrKogaX7qfgylN13RQ_zOtKs9Lxw9BiMS7hLmaW7Tthd4TPbwU0QVeWWYv9EqTf_z3RzbnDAox_sAstSu16poOTYTc2PzS1fvzDHZchJIA8gNuiPZU8K4xphhASdqFJJPZ1d5QZz6P9xOZa3l-0lwHhucdoH2_EtItWbJM5GqTf8JgBGivMA%3D%3D) to weigh on the unanimous House decision to approve resolution condemning China for spy balloon. _"I try to pull folks into the intelligence briefings so they see first-hand what is going on. I do think the spy balloon episode, not just for Democrats, but for everyday Americans, they could see that it wasn't a weather balloon. They could see that we should have taken bolder action while it was over the Pacific ocean.__"_
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWbxtXcfSM92aRWyK7NNKloE9jCghEE3u_mU-V7IXkz7JUtcpkybwt3ZYG9ArtPm_RjXX2hRVPYFBtN3zpK9B8LTaoRh90nZAjCB_SnM2p1ytwTxzgdGzTsqVwYFjL7FTtbJ9L_JIsLMwfUTcrKogaX7qfgylN13RQ_zOtKs9Lxw9B5NoKPZrpxKsB3DTyDGaZaUcUsiKuFrvLmaCPGH1xkbe41pQiXaSx2tM3n9cTKjg8U2rVToMfFWJ9pcMZAv6IxlTOv_rXsK8k6leg2vxQONMA4gCOrSwo0KyT_cWv-ciC3oWxGmNx_grBBO6PaItKEw%3D%3D)

**WALTZ ON CHINA BREIFINGS** Later at midnight, Mike joined Trace Gallagher on [Fox News at Night](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=311b056803194838991df0e5226925e2&_e=O_Qt87jv8FGkCYQzhQLWb7JvapWU8r9wZplBl-NguLP8le7W3LSaDrTgCgUMEC7oiDSojWNQVQXYGvJQ8CONX90emZKZSSzyH1UoEI8MmCsbwk30py_cJh6TiiWFH0_mFVdMTe9t10_QQqN1oheYaM0VABJJTYNVDhhxbCLRRW3x0NjJRPDwynzCAAHAALDPKwKQyVTO1XKLrrdhtvqzWoqzkwtO6KW3LvSSCl-4UGhwtsqntHmitrKt934ke95PODaSC-uegba8mGh0o3KB64iTpabmhO1vYH8SokBx1J7sTW4GZXRHR1uDeJTlMjsF) to discuss how lawmakers were briefed on the Chinese surveillance program. _"At the end of the day I think [the balloon] should have been shot over the Pacific Ocean, not the Atlantic Ocean. You don't shoot down a spy craft after it's done spying.__"_

clean_body: | | | | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From warning of the imminent national security threat posed by the CCP to discussing Biden's State of the Union Address, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. In the News WALTZ ON CHINESE SPY BALLOON Monday morning, Mike kicked off the week by joining Fox New's to discuss the Chinese spy balloon and the vital threat posed by the CCP. "WE ARE IN A COLD WAR WITH THE CCP- The difference though and why this one is so much more dangerous than the one with the soviet union is we are so economically dependent and they have created so many supply chain dependencies. I hope this is a wake up call for the country." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON WHITE HOUSE DEFLECTION On Tuesday, Mike joined CNN's to discuss rising tensions resulting from the CCP balloon, China's rising power, and the White House's refusal to address the issue head-on. "We've heard more spin from the White House about this and other potential balloons that have entered our airspace than facts. There are a lot of questions left unanswered that I am determined to get to the bottom of." Watch the entire segment . WALTZ ON CONDEMNING CHINA Thursday evening, Mike joined Fox Business' to weigh on the unanimous House decision to approve resolution condemning China for spy balloon. "I try to pull folks into the intelligence briefings so they see first-hand what is going on. I do think the spy balloon episode, not just for Democrats, but for everyday Americans, they could see that it wasn't a weather balloon. They could see that we should have taken bolder action while it was over the Pacific ocean." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON CHINA BREIFINGS Later at midnight, Mike joined Trace Gallagher on to discuss how lawmakers were briefed on the Chinese surveillance program. "At the end of the day I think [the balloon] should have been shot over the Pacific Ocean, not the Atlantic Ocean. You don't shoot down a spy craft after it's done spying." Watch the entire clip . This Week in Congress This week, Mike reintroduced the Preserving the Gulf Test Range Act for Military Readiness Act to prevent energy exploration and development that could jeopardize the Gulf Test Range. He also voted to terminate the the COVID-19 vaccination mandate for foreign travelers to the United States and sent a letter with Reps. Kevin Hern and Joe Wilson to President Biden calling for tougher foreign policy towards Iraq as it aligns with the terrorist Iranian regime, along with voting to overturn D.C.'s election law that would allow non-citizens to vote in local elections. Essential Mission Brief Reading Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors! | | | | | | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! | Peter, I had to personally reach out to ask for your urgent support ahead of tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline. Here’s why:
* Republicans only need to win two more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that.
* Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity to flip the Senate next.
* **My team just let me know that we’re on track to fall short of tonight’s $25,000 fundraising goal, and missing a critical goal like this would signal to Mitch McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable.**

**I know we can turn this around, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right away. **In case you missed it, Governor Hogan joined _New Hampshire Today with Chris Ryan_ and _The WFEA Morning Update with Drew Cline_ to discuss his record in Maryland and the future of the Republican party.** **Governor Hogan on Getting Results: **_“I’m a Republican governor in one of the bluest states in America. I got my heavily Democratic, far-left 70% majority Democratic legislature in both houses to cut taxes eight years in a row by $4.8 billion dollars. I think I’m the only Republican governor in America to do that. We were 49th out of 50 states in economic performance. We had the biggest economic turnaround in America. We took a $5 billion deficit and turned it into a $5 billion dollar surplus. It’s not easy to do. Republican governors have made a difference, particularly in Democratic states. And it turns out people like that balance. They like that checks and balances. They like results. They like problems getting solved. We don’t see that in Washington. It’s broken.”_ **[Listen to Governor Hogan on The WFEA Morning Update with Drew Cline here.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=87d3550d597f40e3809909acc102ae68&_e=Cl1JaDRQDc7A4vme1s8WPADFjsyb-pglP3ATidAgJailDCRBoGFI-erf9__CANMBAp01ffEQa9u7cxYV03YuKhjV3o6VOhaHJNi00uG8bRHp7T3hkwVi4RD_-w5EMGpO5tgaPcs4lkeWlhGyJXwZSbPnqKT8xXAg_WHe7-IMxQ5ueahxeAxPd1-UMpsVosszIhOIekE7I0AKizfHuhOQy453SzC7f2U4CPnT57g5ZmWiZNqNpN7roinv0OBzKMcEjzRgXtQe8ySde545rtJqSPUBpWnlLP2ywZY3gtpVsOmFiz784NLPEKRwclyU4CLFNtLEyCHm3sNbn1M9QxVXYF6WIIHoOSEGUwBZe99sKM0J2lJML_pMUyfi59vzW5ADJWvmK2AqU8-Go51ccUpT4lJ1Rp6u9VmTbcBtfGtEkTRv6xLLGQ9oKl1XvP01FkYz_nZOVHLli_CBqjDHcTtWY3pBeZh0n9HA4Exgt2K826Ho5cPR4Ge15bnOaBmmwTS8jkPmZlDqhbECU3DqayZ3f8Y3aS8XW2JmY9Usm1RqJ5d1SA5oUFF0QqHroErRZyDnFtx26qcn612oU0JQxHw7INJxc72Ppmn17ixCkUVC2Fdl9H3haxHvvxl7fxZBWXZJ_mP9M_jplq4VHicp2TnQwQ%3D%3D)** **[Listen to Governor Hogan on New Hampshire Today with Chris Ryan here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=87d3550d597f40e3809909acc102ae68&_e=Cl1JaDRQDc7A4vme1s8WPADFjsyb-pglP3ATidAgJailDCRBoGFI-erf9__CANMBAp01ffEQa9u7cxYV03YuKhjV3o6VOhaHJNi00uG8bRHp7T3hkwVi4RD_-w5EMGpO5tgaPcs4lkeWlhGyJXwZSbPnqKT8xXAg_WHe7-IMxQ7aOIacDF3mmzbfGvvwP9o7xtz5ptxyXs9c7NuJUDw-QxN-kfOo9EAEw_i1wIi7PYWIN4oL4Nx--T7aghz6jePVZF0S9yxnXuxwHNy5zvW4PJFgE2S2ylajXEPbLulSoF7jHycQXfzMMI6RYgKFBk-N5mM8xWCMZMwiOujVOsNYCBEYJn7_UrYKLafgJacXLeqLvuGvbDKxU6ivDaQsI6rfZYxidSctRJh4z1geY5aXYvkwfD3VJkMcG-k-P8nZPvmc0t2VcGVE4hUIbFcKGZUnt3BLkQiYRTd6YGhXFCyKIQ127eGoEk23ErBbgCeBjfO_WnOESjw10cJ14Zm_5q48rOxADCxEjAe7LQZaKYlXdLg2Et-BAuZPaS8bDi3ITFEXXgQbEZcmay9b6-VGUgYTlTrDDZHTBIq6E6ezPd7XtP2dSUDUuumvou26hkzcKxAMX_uqvYuzMnWO_xPUNauiLCYRc9Xol1DYY-VHcKbf0uyFSAm46eh1RsM35R8YYSmA4dtKoXYv8mYCnTj1dFk0Xl-q5Kx-l49OIblO-FoSdQ%3D%3D)**

> As a young man, I had the honor of working for President Reagan as he revitalized the Republican Party and restored the greatness of America.

clean_body: | | | | | "Governor Hogan Joins Fox News’ “Your World with Neil Cavuto"" According to, Governor Hogan joined Jewish community and business leaders in Aventura, Florida to why “our allies, including Israel, need a strong and united America leading the world.” Governor Hogan expressed his strong support for Israel and opposition to the Boycott, Divestment and Sanctions [BDS] movement. In Maryland, Governor Hogan strengthened relations with Israel, traveling there on a trade mission in 2016, and an executive order prohibiting the State from doing business with companies engaged in a boycott of Israel. Last November, Governor Hogan to the Republican Jewish Coalition conference in Las Vegas. In case you missed it, Governor Hogan joined New Hampshire Today with Chris Ryan and The WFEA Morning Update with Drew Cline to discuss his record in Maryland and the future of the Republican party. Governor Hogan on Getting Results: “I’m a Republican governor in one of the bluest states in America. I got my heavily Democratic, far-left 70% majority Democratic legislature in both houses to cut taxes eight years in a row by $4.8 billion dollars. I think I’m the only Republican governor in America to do that. We were 49th out of 50 states in economic performance. We had the biggest economic turnaround in America. We took a $5 billion deficit and turned it into a $5 billion dollar surplus. It’s not easy to do. Republican governors have made a difference, particularly in Democratic states. And it turns out people like that balance. They like that checks and balances. They like results. They like problems getting solved. We don’t see that in Washington. It’s broken.” | | AN UPDATE FROM TWITTER | | | Just 30 miles outside of Washington, we’ve shown that there’s an alternative to the divisiveness and dysfunction we see everyday in our nation’s capitol. Join the team today: — Governor Larry Hogan (@GovLarryHogan) | | | As a young man, I had the honor of working for President Reagan as he revitalized the Republican Party and restored the greatness of America. Today, on the 112th anniversary of President Reagan's birth, I’m reminded that the principles he fought for remain desperately needed. — Governor Larry Hogan (@GovLarryHogan) | | | The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting a different result. We need to stand up for the exhausted majority of Americans who are completely fed up and ready for a change. — Governor Larry Hogan (@GovLarryHogan) | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

name: Team Tina
subject: Gov. Kotek’s plan to tackle the housing and homelessness crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Hi Peter, The homelessness crisis is a complex problem that Governor Kotek and her administration are addressing with people-centered solutions that can help everyone achieve stability and permanent housing. On day one in office, Governor Kotek took immediate action, **declaring a homelessness state of emergency and signing multiple executive orders to help Oregonians move off the streets and prevent families from becoming homeless.** Then the Governor asked the Oregon state legislature to approve **$130 million in funds to build 600 shelter beds, keep 9,000 families housed, and help 1,200 homeless people find shelter,** all with the goal to stave off homelessness. And now, she’s proposed a “Mission Focused” budget for the state, with plans to **increase homelessness shelter operations, and prevention programs and fund new, more affordable housing options.** This is only the beginning, Peter, and Governor Kotek needs to know she has the people behind her as she works to address this urgent crisis. So we’re coming to you: [**Will you add your name to show your support for Governor Tina Kotek’s plans to ensure that no Oregonian has to experience homelessness?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58599214/391601032/-626674076?contactdata=p9a6Hx0RZ/k/Ph3Is2LDvZgIzRVWha3Tr1OTY4mfElndObhhX+RXZ+gxZJGmTwgbghX8xhv6Ilibbz1u0/7oldnC0ulkr4U0EUx816NZIpzmOj+lTglSDoqYCJc9lsbP65ZGZ7xgFPn91f3ydUmb67khDGqGxDM4v4jmi9aRD/I=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230211_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU0YzY5Mi0zZWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkafW7YTE_8owYu5TV3k5bn3uO4R5-sMoCZzRqGGepY=&emci=1fe4c692-3eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=20e4c692-3eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58599215/391601033/-626674076?contactdata=p9a6Hx0RZ/k/Ph3Is2LDvZgIzRVWha3Tr1OTY4mfElndObhhX+RXZ+gxZJGmTwgbghX8xhv6Ilibbz1u0/7oldnC0ulkr4U0EUx816NZIpzmOj+lTglSDoqYCJc9lsbP65ZGZ7xgFPn91f3ydUmb67khDGqGxDM4v4jmi9aRD/I=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230211_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU0YzY5Mi0zZWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkafW7YTE_8owYu5TV3k5bn3uO4R5-sMoCZzRqGGepY=&emci=1fe4c692-3eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=20e4c692-3eaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big Oil only cares about this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/DA2DHJ_m4k-J5PGk_1cY7Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DA2DHJ_m4k-J5PGk_1cY7Q2]

Big Oil cares about one thing and one thing only:
Padding its profits.
We just learned that Exxon set a record for profits last year -- and a historic high for the entire Western oil industry -- raking in $56 billion. That’s over $6 million an hour.
Exxon wasn’t the only corporation to make out. Major oil companies made nearly $200 billion combined last year.
Don’t let anyone tell you corporations can’t pay their workers fair wages.
Corporations could reinvest their exorbitant profits in their workforces and the real economy but instead line their executives’ and shareholders’ pockets. (Exxon gave $30 billion to shareholders last year.)
I introduced and President Biden signed into law a measure that will tax stock buybacks to make sure corporations pay their fair share and encourage them to reinvest in the workers who make their profits possible.
I’m fighting for accountability from the biggest corporations in our country. I’m fighting to make our economy work for everyone -- not just Wall Street. And I’m fighting for the Dignity of ALL Work.
We're taking on powerful corporations and standing on the side of working people, and I want to know if you’ll stand with us. If you will, add your name to mine. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DA2DHJ_m4k-J5PGk_1cY7Q2]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

I introduced and President Biden signed into law a measure that will tax stock buybacks to make sure corporations pay their fair share and encourage them to reinvest in the workers who make their profits possible. I’m fighting for accountability from the biggest corporations in our country. I’m fighting to make our economy work for everyone -- not just Wall Street. And I’m fighting for the Dignity of ALL Work. We're taking on powerful corporations and standing on the side of working people, and I want to know if you’ll stand with us. If you will, add your name to mine. [] With gratitude, Sherrod PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.sherrodbrown.com []

| | **Today, it's Senator Tammy Baldwin's birthday.** And if you'll give me a few minutes of your time, I'll tell you her powerful, inspirational story — and hopefully, you'll decide [it's worth celebrating her birthday by chipping in a few dollars to make sure she's re-elected next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58599760/391603086/-1309475399?refcode=2023-02-11-merkley-for-baldwin&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4adec2e9-40aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlYzJlOS00MGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_h-z1K13NviUoLo69n1bdaRyenMH3XL973zTMIywI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58599763/391603095/-1309475399?refcode=2023-02-11-merkley-for-baldwin&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4adec2e9-40aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlYzJlOS00MGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_h-z1K13NviUoLo69n1bdaRyenMH3XL973zTMIywI=) When Tammy was just nine years old, she spent three months in the hospital with a serious spinal condition. After she recovered, her illness was labeled a "pre-existing condition" making it impossible for her grandparents, who were raising her, to find insurance — at any price. That's why Tammy has fought so hard for health care reform in Congress – including allowing kids to stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26, and banning the use of "pre-existing conditions" to block coverage. She was raised by her grandparents because her mother struggled with mental illness and prescription drug abuse. But as her grandmother grew older, Tammy worked as her primary caregiver. She knows the struggles that families go through to provide for aging seniors. That's why, as a Senator, she passed legislation to support family members that serve as caregivers. Outside Wisconsin, Tammy is perhaps best known as being the first openly-gay non-incumbent elected to the House of Representatives in 1998 and then, in 2018, to the U.S. Senate. But in Wisconsin, she's best known as a champion for working families, small businesses, veterans, children, and seniors. **For me, she's been an invaluable partner in our fight** against the billionaires, Big Pharma, Wall Street, multinational corporations – and the lobbyists and Super PACs that defend their interests against the interests of regular folks across America. She's my co-pilot on the Equality Act and led the fight to get the Respect for Marriage Act passed and defend our marriages from the extremist majority on the Supreme Court. Tammy's a workhorse for our values. **But make no mistake: Wisconsin might be the toughest swing state in America**. Last year, in the same election, Wisconsin re-elected a great Democratic Governor and one of the most MAGA Republican Senators. **[You know how great Tammy is – and why she needs our help – so I'm asking you to chip in $3 to support Tammy Baldwin on her birthday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58599766/391603098/-1309475399?refcode=2023-02-11-merkley-for-baldwin&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4adec2e9-40aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlYzJlOS00MGFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_h-z1K13NviUoLo69n1bdaRyenMH3XL973zTMIywI=)** [**Add your name now to stand with President Biden AGAINST House Republicans' Social Security attacks! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&akid=9789%2E9716520%2EBsHhDA)
| **[ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&akid=9789%2E9716520%2EBsHhDA)**
---

**This is outrageous, Team!**

Ever since they took control of the House, ultra-conservative Republicans have been _determined_ to target hard-earned Social Security that **millions of Americans** count on!

The retirement age: **_RAISED_**. Monthly benefits: **_SLASHED_**. Social Security as we know it: **_GUTTED_**. All that and more is on the GOP's wishlist, **so we need to come together and stop them NOW.**

President Biden is fired up and ready to do everything he can to defend Social Security -- **but we need to know that Democrats like you are with him.**

[**Please, before the midnight deadline: Add your name to stand alongside President Biden and help protect Social Security from House GOP attacks!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&akid=9789%2E9716520%2EBsHhDA)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230211-ActionNeeded-jtk2756-ETG-sl1&akid=9789%2E9716520%2EBsHhDA)**
---

Thanks for taking a stand.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Republicans are worried about Missouri.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
It’s only February and national Republicans are already on defense.

| Peter,

It’s only February, but national Republicans are already starting to play defense in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. **Here’s the situation:**

**LAST MONTH,** just hours after Lucas Kunce announced his campaign on January 6, the group responsible for electing Republicans to the Senate called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley.

**THEN LAST WEEK,** in a coordinated effort with D.C. special interests, that same GOP group launched another weird attack — criticizing Lucas, a man from mid-Missouri, for sounding like... a man from mid-Missouri. Later in the day, Hawley’s campaign even fundraised off it.

**AND THIS WEEK,** Republican National Committee chair, Ronna McDaniel, will travel to Springfield, Missouri to support Hawley + GOP candidates up and down the ballot. | [FIGHT BACK NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58600473/391605785/70822501?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230211_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0NjUwYmE3LTQ2YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nErPKFhGhjt1Hf8Qhax3LWB5UGi4aJ4Udgd2utd_b-o=)
---
Hawley + the GOP insiders in DC know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat. That’s why they’ve already started trying to tear down Lucas and the record-breaking grassroots movement we’re building with him.

**We need to keep fighting back against whatever comes our way between now and Election Day** — and since Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, shady mega-donors, or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs, he needs your help to get it done. So, Peter:

[**Can you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between Lucas’ campaign + UniteDemocrats right now? Anything you can spare will help play a critical role in standing up to Hawley + the national Republicans backing his campaign and electing Lucas to the U.S. Senate in 2024. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58600474/391605786/70822501?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230211_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0NjUwYmE3LTQ2YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nErPKFhGhjt1Hf8Qhax3LWB5UGi4aJ4Udgd2utd_b-o=)

clean_body: It’s only February and national Republicans are already on defense. | Peter, It’s only February, but national Republicans are already starting to play defense in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. Here’s the situation: LAST MONTH, just hours after Lucas Kunce announced his campaign on January 6, the group responsible for electing Republicans to the Senate called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley. THEN LAST WEEK, in a coordinated effort with D.C. special interests, that same GOP group launched another weird attack — criticizing Lucas, a man from mid-Missouri, for sounding like... a man from mid-Missouri. Later in the day, Hawley’s campaign even fundraised off it. AND THIS WEEK, Republican National Committee chair, Ronna McDaniel, will travel to Springfield, Missouri to support Hawley + GOP candidates up and down the ballot. | = Hawley + the GOP insiders in DC know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat. That’s why they’ve already started trying to tear down Lucas and the record-breaking grassroots movement we’re building with him. We need to keep fighting back against whatever comes our way between now and Election Day — and since Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, shady mega-donors, or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs, he needs your help to get it done. So, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thanks for being part of this, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. This is urgent, team.

**In crucial battleground states like Arizona and Ohio, GOP lawmakers are ramping up their attacks on voting rights, and it could have huge implications for 2024.**

**But we have good news: The NDRC is fighting back – and we’re getting results!**

In states like Michigan and Minnesota, our grassroots movement helped elect Democracy Defenders who are now working to _expand_ access to voting. And, across the country, we’re continuing our efforts to mobilize communities to fight back against these unfair restrictions.

[**_Will you pitch in now to help the NDRC continue fighting for voting rights?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58600588/391606210/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230211_FR_2F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlNjUwYmE3LTQ2YWEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kbkp3kr0K4ZqKYQj-vJPgqB-qMhf_Qr_hpoNQium258=)

When extreme right-wing politicians use baseless conspiracy theories as an excuse to restrict voting rights, it puts our democracy at risk.

**At times like this, we must remember what President Obama said: “Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active between elections.”** That’s why the NDRC is continuing our democracy-saving work of fighting for fair maps, defending voting rights, and so much more.
**Our work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just one in every four people reading this email pitches in today, it would make a huge difference.

clean_body: | | = = This is urgent, team. In crucial battleground states like Arizona and Ohio, GOP lawmakers are ramping up their attacks on voting rights, and it could have huge implications for 2024. But we have good news: The NDRC is fighting back – and we’re getting results! In states like Michigan and Minnesota, our grassroots movement helped elect Democracy Defenders who are now working to expand access to voting. And, across the country, we’re continuing our efforts to mobilize communities to fight back against these unfair restrictions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = When extreme right-wing politicians use baseless conspiracy theories as an excuse to restrict voting rights, it puts our democracy at risk. At times like this, we must remember what President Obama said: “Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active between elections.” That’s why the NDRC is continuing our democracy-saving work of fighting for fair maps, defending voting rights, and so much more. Our work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just one in every four people reading this email pitches in today, it would make a huge difference. = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

But that only happens when folks like you step up and chip in what they can. Our official DLCC members are the heart of our operation – we can’t secure wins for state Democrats across the country without the help from our consistent, dedicated supporters. You are what makes all of this work possible. We’re asking you to activate your membership today because state Democrats are facing FIVE important special elections this month in key states like New Hampshire – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November! President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in states like yours.That’s why we rely on grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and help ensure we elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. But that only happens when folks like you step up and chip in what they can. | | For the sake of our state and our country, we’ve got to take back the House of Representatives so we can remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from her positions on some of the most powerful Congressional committees. Here’s why:
* She humiliated herself and our state by booing and jeering at President Biden during the State of the Union.
* She’s an extremist who spouts antisemitic and racist conspiracy theories.
* She’s spreading dangerous conspiracy theories about vaccinations and COVID-19.
* She denied the legitimacy of the 2020 election, putting our democracy at risk!

Now that the GOP has the House majority, Marjorie Taylor Greene is serving on some of the most powerful committees in Congress and has the ear of the Speaker of the House. Peter, we can’t let this stand!

[**_We need to remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from her powerful committees in 2024! name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: I know what I believe in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
From the moment I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have never wavered in my belief in our grassroots movement. I know what else I believe in: dark money and outsized spending should not buy our elections.
**I don’t believe that our politics and policies should be bought, so I won’t be either.** I have never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs or dark money groups, and I never will. And I know it only makes our movement stronger, because true people power wins — that’s why we’ve started this new session of Congress with **_more progressives than ever before._**
[**Peter, will you take a moment to give to our grassroots campaign today, so we can start 2023 off strong? We’re going to need this momentum to keep building our progressive power — and your support makes all the difference.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34635?refcode=em20230211-2160&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2160%2E420207%2EiqEfMN)
**It is important that we start strong, Peter, because this moment in time matters.**
Republicans have regained control of the House, and have already started executing their extreme partisan agenda by singling out progressives, targeting critical policy, and holding our economy hostage. Our progressive coalition is taking a stand, but we have to make sure our own campaigns stay strong while we fight the GOP on multiple fronts.
_That’s why I’m writing to you now with a personal request._ I am not here to guilt trip you. There is no imaginary donor who will triple match your donation, and the sky is not falling. **Just you and me, and my sincere hope that you will recognize the importance of this moment.**
[**If you are in a position to make a contribution today, I would appreciate it greatly. Please know that your support always makes a difference for us.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34635?refcode=em20230211-2160&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2160%2E420207%2EiqEfMN)
At the end of the day, every election I’ve won, every fundraising goal I’ve hit, every milestone I’ve worked with our Progressive Caucus to achieve — it all comes down to you.
Thank you for your steadfast support.
Pramila
(Sent from my iPhone)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230211-2160-footer&t=3&refcode2=2160_420207_iqEfMN&akid=2160%2E420207%2EiqEfMN)**

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: I need your help to send a message to Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
These mail delays are unacceptable.

Folks, right now some families in Colorado — including many in my district — are going weeks at a time without receiving mail. For these Coloradans, the delays mean they either wait weeks for essentials like, for instance, prescription drugs and clothing — or they have to drive hours to pick things up. **[Friend, will you join me in sending a message to Postmaster General Louis DeJoy that these delays are completely unacceptable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601638/391611492/172277206?refcode=email_021023_postal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDg4MTM3YS00ZmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6X1ON4SvHuQwH8K9kRBZJJOd8v0w0FRXxHaJCEsAG0Q=&emci=d8ccf7e4-5ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0088137a-4faa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601643/391611498/172277206?refcode=email_021023_postal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDg4MTM3YS00ZmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6X1ON4SvHuQwH8K9kRBZJJOd8v0w0FRXxHaJCEsAG0Q=&emci=d8ccf7e4-5ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0088137a-4faa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)
---
When I was elected to Congress, I promised to fight hard every day for the regular families in our community. And right now, too many of my constituents are suffering inexcusable delays due to Louis DeJoy’s failures.
**[So I encourage you to make your voice heard and send a message to DeJoy that you’re paying attention, and that he needs to either fix these problems or get out of the way so someone else can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58601646/391611503/1930949703?refcode=email_021023_postal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDg4MTM3YS00ZmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6X1ON4SvHuQwH8K9kRBZJJOd8v0w0FRXxHaJCEsAG0Q=&emci=d8ccf7e4-5ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0088137a-4faa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)**
I will keep you updated. Thank you for your help on this important issue.
-Brittany

| Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y6N32-PBR02A61hdKqQ9kg2?unsubscribedata=6qZVVpyHI%2BZ%2BhcqTUYFRekzEV7efA7aluw625VyoUAhB3wigTUi6S%2FQxeXiBHKLov2nvUXQ7w6CXVVUTrBWIgbjljl93SRzh419J3Ms9u7yY5ZckzwSDonVD0CbKzP7xkQgzsReXqXHyGbmFRifX7zfeX5Ui5HfxhYlEAxVA%2BQ0GVdDXsE8uLhioCqx7rEuo3JlftmOIjwnJjiVtzgunJJ8adLdUWLPlLxH%2BRBgNPEyK1NjtNqoAcruLWT4%2FgIhJCBLmsDDrV8YKGay0BVBEdJ5NYEiWKGCI3hhKpCWfl07m97nLxMWmCt%2FSuPm5kGB5qeoZQZR0dGTMGUdJ4URP1Zn5FLrSK%2Bay6mFY6KXeo2DD6C6ux0kgXc7ZHM0KBjx6YcNMCZ5tQN9GeikBQNfLZ8L3YDAh37rzCYtPGravnDfnb3BkoK2DBVwjc8t%2BqPBX)**.

Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. **So, Derek, we need you in this fight. Here are a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership could help support:**
* 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states;
* 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure;
* 💪Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day.

Our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. | | Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. So, Derek, we need you in this fight. Here are a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership could help support: 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states; 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure; 💪Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day. You haven’t donated to renew your membership yet, Derek. Will you make a commitment to supporting Democrats in 2023 and beyond by renewing your DNC membership right now? When you do, we’ll send you your very own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. ** The team at the DNC is already looking ahead. Democrats won across the country in 2022 because of grassroots support, and we’re prepared to do it again. But first, we need you on board. |

**“LIAR!”** That’s what Marjorie Taylor Greene shouted at President Biden during his State of the Union address Tuesday night. The very same woman who talks about Jewish space lasers, is a QAnon truther, and insisted one Illinois elementary school received _$5.1 billion_ to teach critical race theory called Joe Biden a liar. In 2009, when Rep. Joe Wilson shouted “You lie!” during President Obama’s State of the Union, it was condemned by both sides of the aisle, Rep. WIlson issued a formal apology, and the House took the rare step of passing a resolution of disapproval. Now, MTG’s outburst is accepted as normal by the Republicans. They have allowed her and her brand of politics to run rampant for far too long. It’s time to kick her out of Congress once and for all. body:
Bernie Sanders is fed up with Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz and his illegal
union busting tactics.

Bernie is demanding Howard Schultz testify, and in response, Schultz is
going to attack Bernie ferociously. That’s why we need your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230211_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_union&t=1009&akid=4000%2E5885482%2EllSSIK ]Rush a donation now to stand with Bernie against union busting
billionaires, and read our message below for more details on the fight
ahead!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230211_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_union&t=1010&akid=4000%2E5885482%2EllSSIK ][IMG]
