Peter Willis,

As workers unionize to demand fair pay and
better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal
union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million
in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of
unionizing stores across America.

If that’s not bad enough, they’ve also closed unionized stores and hired
union busters who previously worked for the infamous Pinkerton Detective
Agency.

That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO
Howard Schultz testify before his committee.

the full power of his resources. Can we count on you to chip in to stand
with workers and help Bernie and Our Revolution hold Starbucks
accountable?

will process immediately.

[ ]Rush a donation now to stand with Bernie against union busting billionaires, and read our message below for more details on the fight ahead! ----Begin Forwarded Message---- [ ][IMG] [ ]STAND WITH BERNIE Peter Willis, As workers unionize to demand fair pay and better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of unionizing stores across America. If that’s not bad enough, they’ve also closed unionized stores and hired union busters who previously worked for the infamous Pinkerton Detective Agency. That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz testify before his committee. [ ]Howard Schultz is a billionaire and is already attacking Bernie with the full power of his resources. Can we count on you to chip in to stand with workers and help Bernie and Our Revolution hold Starbucks accountable? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ ]CHIP IN $18 NOW » [ ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW » [ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » In solidarity, Our Revolution [ ]Our membership card Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $10 or more a month! name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We know Rick Scott is coming for Medicare and Social Security. While Democrats don’t have a nominee yet to take him on, we can raise funds for that candidate now, so they can come out of the gate positioned to win.
body:
Not-Rick Scott 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3a1a8b7-7ace-47eb-ba08-5edcd7f66e02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Rick Scott already came for Medicare. Now he's coming for our Medicare & Social Security._** [**_Donate now: Anyone But Rick Scott For Florida 2024_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd665bc0-b3b8-4909-9c28-c81dec1f99aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _There was a lot of booing from Republicans during the State of the Union, when Joe Biden rightfully shared their plans--specifically Rick Scott's plan, which he's discussed, committed to paper and tweeted--to sunset Social Security & Medicare every five years._ ** In Other Words: To End Them. ** **_Scott oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history. When he was CEO of Columbia/HCA hospitals they got a $1.7 billion fine._****_ His company robbed the American people of funding for our healthcare. Then, i_**** _n the civil trial, he took the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times, _****and** _** parlayed his ill-begotten wealth into a political career. **It's stomach-turning._ _**Now Scott wants to take our Social Security & Medicare, using the GOP sunset trick. It's how they make programs disappear they lack the courage to demolish.** __In 1994, to get Republicans to support an assault weapons ban, President Clinton agreed to a 10-year sunset. When 2004 arrived, George W. Bush was President, and this life-saving law just went away. How many have suffered and died because of it?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ca79c8f-bc88-443c-9736-65b6583d11eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1141e4b6-ab05-42bc-bf4d-5e104b922873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Don't let Scott ROB our Social Security & Medicare. He's running for reelection in 2024 and a Democratic fund--a way for you to give NOW to the eventual Democratic nominee--i _s set up to beat him_._** Sure, Florida's become tougher, but Scott's so unlikeable and scandal-tainted, he's only won his statewide races by 1.2%, 1% and .12%. **_He 100% can be beaten, and he must. Because, again, he's coming for our Social Security and Medicare, and he has practice._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to beat scoundrel Rick Scott and stop him from ripping away our Medicare and Social Security?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93fa3d10-2746-4ea4-bc78-497a6acc8b3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Blue Amp Action community. Cliff
---
| | |

|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce65f415-a1c8-4f92-8737-8e6c1eb95cd9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Democrats were quick to jump on accusations of "collusion and Russian election interference" when it suited their purpose against President Trump.**
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

**Now, they are putting their head in the sand because they have been CAUGHT RED-HANDED colluding with Big Tech to interfere with our elections!**
**During a Congressional hearing conducted by the House Oversight Committee yesterday, it was disclosed that Twitter and Facebook executives and employees have been colluding with officials from the National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS), Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the National Association of State Election Directors (NASED) to specifically target, ban, and censor accounts on various social media sites in a collaborative manner.**
**And if it 's not already obvious, the players from NASS and CISA were government officials who oversee our elections. CISA falls under the Department of Homeland Security, and in November of 2022, they went on the record saying they're taking a "hands off" approach to what they call "election-related disinformation." Well... obviously not.**
**Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna questioned Twitter employee Yoel Roth, the former head of Twitter Trust and Safety. "Trust and Safety" is the Orwellian term for censorship.**
**Roth has been caught using the private cloud server, Jira, to collude with Facebook executives and government officials.**
[Rep. Anna Paulina Luna @RepLunaThis is joint action between the federal government and a private company to censor Americans and violate the First Amendment. What you all were doing is highly illegal, and I want you to know that you'll be held accountable. ⬇️🔥 ](https://substack.com/redirect/d08c5456-8eef-418a-8604-4a7a5ae9dafa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[9:37 PM ∙ Feb 8, 2023

**When Roth was directly asked if he communicated with a private entity and government agencies on a private cloud server, he responded, "I don't believe I can give you a yes or no."**
**Ironically, Roth 's communication was printed and displayed right behind Luna's shoulder on an exhibit she then entered as a form of evidence into the Congressional hearing.**

**If we want to talk about collusion to interfere with elections, it has always been between our own government, Big Tech, the FBI, and the media!**
